title: foap4: Adaptive mesh refinement with OpenACC, MPI, and p4est
summary: GPUs and other accelerators are increasingly used for scientific computing. In the future, we want to add GPU support to parallel adaptive mesh refinement (AMR) codes written in Fortran. To understand which changes are necessary to obtain good performance we have developed foap4, an AMR framework implemented in Fortran that uses OpenACC, MPI, and the p4est library. We discuss the design and implementation of the framework. Several benchmark problems are considered, in which Euler's equations of gas dynamics are solved using explicit time integration. These benchmarks are performed in both 2D and 3D, using static and adaptive meshes, for varying problem sizes on different hardware. Our results show that AMR simulations can be carried out efficiently on GPUs with OpenACC and MPI, even when using relatively small grid blocks of $8^3$ or $16^3$ cells.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了foap4框架，一个基于Fortran、OpenACC、MPI和p4est库的并行自适应网格细化（AMR）框架，旨在为科学计算中的GPU加速提供支持。通过在2D和3D中求解欧拉方程，使用静态和自适应网格进行基准测试，结果表明即使在较小的网格块（如8³或16³单元）下，AMR模拟也能在GPU上高效运行。
AI.motivation: 随着GPU等加速器在科学计算中的日益普及，亟需为使用Fortran编写的并行自适应网格细化（AMR）代码添加GPU支持，以提升计算性能。
AI.method: 开发了foap4框架，采用Fortran语言，集成OpenACC、MPI和p4est库，实现AMR的GPU加速。通过2D和3D欧拉方程求解的基准测试，在静态和自适应网格下，对不同问题规模和硬件进行评估。
AI.result: 实验表明，基于OpenACC和MPI的AMR模拟可在GPU上高效执行，即使使用较小的网格块（8³或16³单元）也能获得良好性能。
AI.conclusion: foap4框架证明了使用OpenACC和MPI在GPU上进行AMR模拟的可行性，为未来将GPU支持集成到现有Fortran AMR代码中提供了实践指导和性能参考。

title: Physics-Informed Reduced-Order Operator Learning for Hyperelasticity in Continuum Micromechanics
summary: Physics-informed operator learning is an attractive candidate for surrogate modeling of microstructures, especially in multiscale finite-element simulations. Its practical use, however, is often limited by the high cost of loss evaluation. We address this bottleneck by combining the Equilibrium Neural Operator (EquiNO) with the QR-based discrete empirical interpolation method (Q-DEIM). EquiNO learns only the modal coefficients of reduced displacement-fluctuation and first Piola-Kirchhoff stress representations built from periodic and divergence-free bases, thereby enforcing periodicity and mechanical equilibrium by construction. Q-DEIM then identifies a small set of spatial points through a column-pivoted QR factorization of the stress basis and restricts constitutive evaluations during training to these points alone. This makes full-batch second-order optimization practical for three-dimensional representative volume elements (RVEs). Homogenized first Piola-Kirchhoff stresses are recovered directly from the offline-averaged reduced stress modes, without the need to reconstruct the full stress field at inference time. We validate the framework on two three-dimensional finite-strain hyperelastic RVEs. Q-DEIM reduces the per-step training cost by roughly three orders of magnitude relative to full-field loss evaluation, while reduced homogenization achieves speed-up factors of order $10^3$ to $10^4$ over direct full-field computations. Despite relying on only a small number of offline snapshot loading paths for basis construction, the method accurately interpolates and extrapolates both microscopic stress fields and homogenized stresses, with prediction quality improving systematically as more snapshots are added.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将Equilibrium Neural Operator (EquiNO)与基于QR分解的离散经验插值方法(Q-DEIM)相结合，用于微结构代理建模。EquiNO通过学习约化位移波动和第一Piola-Kirchhoff应力表示的模态系数，从构造上强制执行周期性和力学平衡；Q-DEIM通过应力基的列主元QR分解识别少量空间点，将训练中的本构评估限制在这些点上，使三维RVE的全批量二阶优化成为可能。在三维有限应变超弹性RVE上验证，Q-DEIM将每步训练成本降低约三个数量级，约化均质化比直接全场计算快10^3-10^4倍。
AI.motivation: 物理驱动的算子学习在微结构代理建模中有吸引力，尤其在多尺度有限元模拟中。然而其实际应用常受限于损失评估的高昂成本。本文旨在解决这一瓶颈，使三维代表性体积元(RVE)的全批量二阶优化变得可行。
AI.method: 1) 使用EquiNO学习约化表示（位移波动和应力）的模态系数，通过周期性和散度自由基强制满足周期性和力学平衡；2) 采用Q-DEIM通过应力基的列主元QR分解选择少量空间点，将本构评估限制在这些点上；3) 均质化应力直接从离线平均的约化应力模态恢复，无需重建全场应力。
AI.result: 在三维有限应变超弹性RVE上验证：Q-DEIM将每步训练成本降低约三个数量级；约化均质化实现10^3-10^4倍的加速；仅依赖少量离线快照加载路径，方法能准确插值和外推微观应力场和均质化应力；预测质量随快照增加系统性地提升。
AI.conclusion: EquiNO与Q-DEIM的组合有效解决了物理信息算子学习中损失评估的高成本问题，使三维RVE的高效全批量二阶优化训练成为现实。该方法在显著降低计算成本的同时保持了良好的预测精度和泛化能力，为多尺度有限元模拟中的微结构代理建模提供了实用解决方案。

title: A Time-Domain Method of Auxiliary Sources for Analyzing Transient Electromagnetic Interactions with GSTC-Modeled Metasurfacess
summary: This paper presents a time domain (TD) formulation for modeling the transient electromagnetic response of two-dimensional (2D) metasurfaces using the Method of Auxiliary Sources (MAS) combined with the Generalized Sheet Transition Condition (GSTC). In the proposed approach, the frequency-domain impedance type GSTC is transformed into a causal, convolution-based TD representation and integrated within the MAS formulation. rfaces.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合辅助源法和广义薄片过渡条件的时域公式，用于建模二维超表面的瞬态电磁响应。
AI.motivation: 现有的超表面建模方法多局限于频域分析，缺乏有效的时域建模手段来处理瞬态电磁响应问题。
AI.method: 将频域阻抗型GSTC转换为基于卷积的因果时域表示，并将其集成到MAS公式中，形成时域公式。
AI.result: 成功实现了二维超表面瞬态电磁响应的时域建模。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的MAS-GSTC时域公式为超表面的瞬态电磁响应分析提供了一种有效的新方法。

title: Development of embedded target detection system based on FPGA and YOLOv3-Tiny
summary: Computational complexity and storage requirements are crucial factors influencing the performance and efficiency of convolutional neural networks (CNNs) in resource-constrained environments. This paper presents a high-performance embedded target detection system based on FPGA and YOLOv3-Tiny, specifically designed for embedded artificial intelligence applications. By integrating lightweight CNN optimization techniques with hardware accelerator design, significant improvements are made in both computational efficiency and resource utilization. Key optimizations, including low-bit quantization, batch normalization fusion, and table lookup mapping, reduce model parameters and computational complexity. Additionally, an FPGA hardware accelerator with a pipelined architecture is developed to enhance the efficiency of convolution operations while minimizing off-chip data transmission through modular design and on-chip cache optimization. On the ZYNQ-XC7Z035 platform, the system achieves an inference latency of 0.211 seconds, outperforming comparable designs by 75.58% in speed. The system achieves an power efficiency of 10.11 GOPS/W, surpassing comparable designs by at least 29.45%. Furthermore, hardware resource utilization is reduced by up to 51.94% compared to similar systems. This study offers innovative design methodologies and practical application examples for the efficient deployment of deep learning models on embedded platforms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于FPGA和YOLOv3-Tiny的高性能嵌入式目标检测系统，通过低比特量化、批归一化融合、查表映射等轻量化CNN优化技术，结合流水线架构的FPGA硬件加速器，在ZYNQ-XC7Z035平台上实现了0.211秒的推理延迟、10.11 GOPS/W的能效比，并在资源利用上优于同类设计最高达51.94%。
AI.motivation: 在资源受限的嵌入式环境中，卷积神经网络(CNN)面临计算复杂度和存储需求的双重挑战，亟需兼顾高性能与低资源消耗的部署方案。
AI.method: 1) 采用低比特量化、批归一化融合、查表映射等轻量化CNN优化技术减少模型参数和计算复杂度；2) 设计基于流水线架构的FPGA硬件加速器，通过模块化设计和片上缓存优化减少片外数据传输，提升卷积运算效率。
AI.result: 在ZYNQ-XC7Z035平台上，推理延迟0.211秒（速度提升75.58%），能效比10.11 GOPS/W（提升至少29.45%），硬件资源利用率降低最高达51.94%。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为深度学习模型在嵌入式平台上的高效部署提供了创新的设计方法和实用的应用范例，验证了软硬件协同优化在资源受限场景下的有效性。

title: Many-body theory predictions of positron binding energies in five-membered heterocycles involving N, O, S and NH substituents
summary: Positron binding energies and Dyson orbitals for five-membered heterocycles with N, O, S and NH substituents are predicted \emph{ab initio} via many-body theory. The positron-molecule correlation potential (self energy) is calculated via solution of Bethe-Salpeter equations that describe the positron-induced polarization of the target and screening of the electron-positron Coulomb interaction at the $GW$@BSE level, the infinite electron-positron ladder series that describes the crucially important process of virtual positronium formation, and the analogous positron-hole ladder series. The all-order calculations employ Gaussian-orbital bases and are implemented in the {\tt EXCITON+} code. The effect of substituting combinations of N, O and S atoms, and the NH group in the molecule's ring is studied, and the role of individual molecular orbitals, many of which are found to significantly contribute to the correlation potential, quantified. Analysis of the positron bound-state Dyson orbitals shows that the positron is typically localized next to one or two of the substituents in the ring, with the order of preference N, S, O, then NH, and is also influenced by aromaticity and the presence of double ($π$) bonds in the ring.

AI.tldr: 本文通过多体理论（GW@BSE级别）从头计算了含N、O、S和NH取代基的五元杂环分子的正电子结合能及Dyson轨道，发现正电子优先局域在N、S、O、NH取代基附近，且受芳香性和π键影响。
AI.motivation: 研究不同杂原子（N, O, S）和NH基团取代对五元杂环分子中正电子结合能及轨道局域行为的影响，理解分子轨道对正电子-分子关联势的贡献。
AI.method: 采用多体微扰理论，通过求解Bethe-Salpeter方程计算正电子-分子关联势（自能），在GW@BSE级别描述正电子诱导的极化、电子-正电子库仑相互作用的屏蔽、虚正电子素形成（无穷阶梯级数）以及正电子-空穴阶梯级数。使用Gaussian轨道基组，在EXCITON+代码中实现全阶计算。
AI.result: 成功预测了不同取代五元杂环的正电子结合能；发现多个分子轨道显著贡献于关联势；正电子优先局域顺序为N > S > O > NH，且受到芳香性和环内双键（π键）的影响。
AI.conclusion: 正电子在五元杂环分子中倾向于局域在特定杂原子附近，N原子是最强的吸引位点，取代基类型和分子电子结构（芳香性、π键）共同决定正电子的束缚行为。

title: Breaking the Trade-off: Bulk 2D Ising Superconductivity with High Tc and Giant Interlayer Spacing via a Unique Chain Intercalation in (BaS)1/3TaS2
comment: Mian Text 26 pages, 6 figures abd SI 6 pages, 1 figure, 3 tables
summary: Two-dimensional (2D) transition metal dichalcogenides (TMDs) are promising platforms for low dimensional superconductivity. However, in conventional intercalated systems, achieving a high superconducting transition temperature (Tc) often comes at the expense of reduced interlayer spacing and weakened 2D character. Here, we overcome this long-standing compromise through a unique chain-like intercalation strategy. We report the synthesis and properties of a new polymorph, (BaS)1/3TaS2, in which a distinctive Ba-S-S-Ba chain structure is inserted between TaS2 bilayers. This unique configuration breaks the bulk c axis mirror symmetry while achieving exceptional interlayer decoupling, with an inter-bilayer spacing of 12.75 Å-more than three times that of pristine 2H-TaS2. By suppressing interlayer electronic coupling, this structural evolution allows local inversion symmetry breaking within individual TaS2 layers to dominate. This prevents compensation of the Ising spin-orbit fields typical of centrosymmetric bulk phases, enabling robust 2D Ising superconductivity. Remarkably, the compound exhibits an enhanced Tc without sacrificing its large interlayer spacing, thereby breaking the conventional trade-off between large spacing/high anisotropy and high Tc. Comprehensive transport, magnetic, and thermodynamic measurements confirm its robust superconducting state. Our work establishes a versatile intercalation framework for designing bulk-like 2D Ising superconductors, providing a new route to reconcile competing material demands and expanding the scope of Ising superconductivity research.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了一种通过链状插层策略合成的新型多态体(BaS)1/3TaS2，成功打破了高Tc与大层间距/强二维特性之间的传统权衡，实现了具有大层间距（12.75 Å）的鲁棒二维伊辛超导，且Tc得到提升。
AI.motivation: 传统插层体系中，实现高超导转变温度(Tc)往往以牺牲层间距和二维特性为代价。本文旨在解决这一长期存在的矛盾，通过独特的链状插层策略，在不损失大层间距的前提下实现高Tc的二维伊辛超导。
AI.method: 采用链状插层策略合成新型多态体(BaS)1/3TaS2，在TaS2双层之间插入独特的Ba-S-S-Ba链状结构。通过抑制层间电子耦合，使单个TaS2层内的局域反转对称性破缺占据主导地位，从而避免体相中伊辛自旋-轨道场的补偿效应。
AI.result: 成功合成了(BaS)1/3TaS2，其层间距达到12.75 Å，是原始2H-TaS2的三倍以上。该材料实现了增强的Tc，同时保持了大的层间距和高各向异性，打破了传统权衡。输运、磁学和热力学测量证实了其鲁棒的超导态。
AI.conclusion: 本文建立了一种通用的插层框架，用于设计体相类二维伊辛超导体，为调和竞争性材料需求提供了新路径，并拓展了伊辛超导研究的范围。

title: Diffusive transport from spatially correlated random phase kicks
summary: We study the dynamics of a single-particle wave packet on a one-dimensional lattice subject to periodic random phase kicks with finite spatial correlation length. This stroboscopic setting provides a controllable model of dephasing in driven quantum systems. Using a momentum-space formulation, we show that the evolution is governed by an accumulated phase whose structure determines the spreading of the wave packet. We find that the phase kicks strongly suppress ballistic transport and induce diffusion at long times. We derive an explicit analytical expression for the diffusion coefficient as a function of the correlation length, in excellent agreement with numerical simulations. Our results uncover a simple mechanism by which spatially correlated phase noise controls quantum transport, and provide a quantitatively testable prediction for diffusion in periodically driven lattice systems. Possible experimental realizations in cold-atom platforms are discussed.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了一维晶格中单粒子波包在周期性随机相位冲击（具有有限空间相关长度）下的动力学，发现相位冲击抑制弹道输运并诱导长时扩散，推导出了扩散系数与相关长度的解析表达式，并通过数值模拟验证。
AI.motivation: 理解空间相关的相位噪声如何控制量子输运，为周期性驱动量子系统中的退相干提供可控模型。
AI.method: 采用动量空间形式化方法，研究单粒子波包在周期性随机相位冲击下的演化，推导累积相位结构对波包扩散的影响，并解析推导扩散系数表达式。
AI.result: 相位冲击强烈抑制弹道输运并诱导长时扩散；推导出扩散系数与空间相关长度的显式解析表达式，与数值模拟高度吻合。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了空间相关相位噪声控制量子输运的简单机制，为周期性驱动晶格系统中的扩散提供了可定量检验的预测，并讨论了在冷原子平台上的实验实现可能性。

title: Landau free energy and the absence of spontaneous magnetization of the one-dimensional Ising model
comment: 13 pages, 3 figs. To appear in European Journal of Physics. Comments are welcome
summary: We revisit the problem of spontaneous magnetization of the one-dimensional Ising model from the Landau free energy perspective. To this end, we define and calculate the density of states of the one-dimensional Ising model following a technique introduced by Ising. The observed monotonicity property of the density of states suggests heuristically that the model does not exhibit spontaneous magnetization at any finite temperature. Subsequently, we solve the model exactly in the thermodynamic limit by employing the maximum-term approximation, which is feasible due to the simple analytical expression of the density of states. We also show that the Landau free energy is an increasing function of $|m|$ and its second derivative at $m=0$ is positive and non-analytic in temperature, proving rigorously the absence of spontaneous magnetization of the model at any finite temperature.

AI.tldr: 本文从朗道自由能角度重新审视一维伊辛模型的自发磁化问题，通过定义和计算态密度，证明了该模型在任何有限温度下均不存在自发磁化现象。
AI.motivation: 重新从朗道自由能视角审视一维伊辛模型的自发磁化问题，提供更严格和启发性的证明。
AI.method: 采用Ising提出的技术定义并计算一维伊辛模型的态密度，利用态密度的单调性进行启发式论证，并通过最大项近似在热力学极限下精确求解模型，最后分析朗道自由能关于磁化强度m的单调性和二阶导数的非解析性。
AI.result: 态密度具有单调性；朗道自由能是|m|的增函数，且在m=0处的二阶导数为正且关于温度非解析。
AI.conclusion: 严格证明了一维伊辛模型在任何有限温度下都不存在自发磁化。

title: Quantum spin liquid on a 3D bipartite lattice of spin trimers stabilized by enhanced effective anisotropy
summary: Quantum spin liquids (QSLs) represent highly entangled states of matter in which frustration-induced quantum fluctuations suppress any symmetry-breaking phase transition down to absolute zero, giving rise to fractionalized excitations and emergent gauge fields. Theoretically, bond anisotropy can stabilize QSLs even on bipartite lattices, as exemplified by the Kitaev honeycomb model; however, no material has so far been established to realize such a state as its true ground state. Here we identify the three-dimensional spin-trimer magnet KBa$_3$Ca$_4$Cu$_3$V$_7$O$_{28}$ as a promising candidate for a bipartite quantum spin liquid persisting to the lowest temperatures. Strongly coupled Cu$^{2+}$ trimers form effective pseudospin-1/2 degrees of freedom upon cooling, which in turn constitute a three-dimensional bipartite network. Bulk thermodynamic measurements, neutron scattering, $μ$SR, and NMR detect no spin freezing or symmetry-breaking phase transition down to 20 mK, but instead reveal a gapless dynamical ground state with algebraic spin autocorrelations. Complementary Monte Carlo and exact-diagonalization calculations show that this state is stabilized by a strong enhancement of effective anisotropy: a weak microscopic Cu-Cu exchange anisotropy of approximately 15 percent is generically amplified at the trimer level, producing effective pseudospin-pseudospin interaction anisotropies of 60 to 100 percent. Our results establish trimer-based networks as a promising platform for realizing anisotropy-stabilized quantum entangled states, even in three-dimensional bipartite systems with only weak microscopic anisotropy.

AI.tldr: 本文发现三维自旋三聚体磁体KBa₃Ca₄Cu₃V₇O₂₈是一种双分子格子的量子自旋液体候选材料，其有效各向异性通过三聚体结构被大幅放大（从15%放大到60-100%），从而在仅含弱微观各向异性的三维双分子体系中稳定了量子自旋液体基态。
AI.motivation: 量子自旋液体是高度纠缠的物质态，但如何在双分子格子上实现稳定的量子自旋液体基态一直缺乏实验材料验证。本文旨在寻找并确认一种能在最低温下保持量子自旋液体行为的双分子体系材料。
AI.method: 通过合成KBa₃Ca₄Cu₃V₇O₂₈候选材料，综合运用热力学测量、中子散射、μSR和NMR等实验手段，并结合蒙特卡洛和精确对角化理论计算进行分析。
AI.result: 实验未检测到任何自旋冻结或对称性破缺相变直至20 mK，而是发现了具有代数自旋自相关的无隙动态基态；理论计算表明三聚体结构将约15%的弱微观Cu-Cu交换各向异性放大了约60-100%的有效各向异性，从而稳定了量子自旋液体相。
AI.conclusion: 三聚体基网络是实现各向异性稳定化量子纠缠态的有前景平台，即使是在仅含弱微观各向异性的三维双分子体系中也能实现量子自旋液体。

title: LLM-Guided Open Hypothesis Learning from Autonomous Scanning Probe Microscopy Experiments
summary: Autonomous experimentation has transformed microscopy and materials discovery by enabling closed-loop optimization including imaging and spectroscopy tuning, strucutre property relationship discovery, and exploration of combinatorial libraries. However, most current workflows remain limited to selecting measurements within fixed objective or hypothesis spaces, rather than generating new physical models from experimental data. Here, we introduce an open hypothesis-learning framework that combines symbolic regression with large-language-model-based physical evaluation and implement it for autonomous scanning probe microscopy. Symbolic regression generates candidate analytical relationships directly from sparse measurements, while the language-model evaluator ranks these candidates according to physical plausibility, scaling behavior, and consistency with known mechanisms. We demonstrate the approach on autonomous piezoresponse force microscopy measurements of ferroelectric domain switching in a PZT thin film. Starting from five seed measurements, the workflow evolves from physically incomplete candidate expressions toward interpretable voltage-time growth laws consistent with kinetic domain-wall motion. This work extends autonomous microscopy from closed-loop optimization toward open hypothesis discovery, where candidate physical laws emerge from the experiment itself rather than being specified in advance. More broadly, the framework establishes a route for integrating symbolic regression, physical reasoning, and adaptive experimentation into hierarchical autonomous scientific workflows.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合符号回归与大语言模型的开源假设学习框架，用于自主扫描探针显微镜实验。该框架能从稀疏测量数据中生成候选物理规律，并通过语言模型评估其物理合理性，在铁电畴开关实验中成功从少量初始测量演化出可解释的电压-时间生长规律，将自主显微镜从闭环优化扩展至开放式假设发现。
AI.motivation: 现有自主实验工作流局限于在固定的目标或假设空间中选择测量方案，无法从实验数据中生成新的物理模型。作者希望突破这一限制，使实验系统能够自主发现候选物理规律。
AI.method: 提出开放假设学习框架，核心结合两种技术：(1) 符号回归——从稀疏测量数据中生成候选解析关系；(2) 基于大语言模型的物理评估器——根据物理合理性、标度行为及与已知机制的一致性对候选表达式排序。在PZT薄膜的自主压电力显微镜测量中实现该框架。
AI.result: 从5个种子测量开始，工作流能从物理不完整的候选表达式逐步演化出可解释的电压-时间生长规律，且该规律与动力学畴壁运动机制一致。
AI.conclusion: 该工作将自主显微镜从闭环优化扩展到开放式假设发现，使候选物理定律直接从实验本身涌现而非事先指定。为将符号回归、物理推理与自适应实验整合到分层自主科学工作流中建立了路径。

title: On the single-Hessian Gaussian wavepacket dynamics
summary: Single-Hessian Gaussian wavepacket dynamics (GWD) significantly reduces the computational burden of Heller's local harmonic GWD, while maintaining comparable accuracy in approximating vibronic spectra. Here, we provide a new, symplectic derivation of the equations of motion of single-Hessian GWD and show that, unlike the local harmonic version, this method conserves the non-canonical symplectic structure on the manifold of Gaussian wavepackets and$-$for bounded dynamics in smooth potentials$-$avoids the drift of energy. Our numerical results suggest that, despite being much more efficient than the local harmonic variant, the single-Hessian GWD exhibits the same $\mathcal{O}(\hbar)$ asymptotic error in averages of observables. To further accelerate numerical simulations, we implement high-order time-stepping geometric integrators that are time-reversible and conserve the norm and symplectic structure exactly, regardless of the time step. In addition, we present explicit expressions for the exact evolution of the width of a single-Hessian Gaussian wavepacket in a general potential, as well as for the exact evolution of the whole wavepacket in a global harmonic potential. Using on-the-fly ab initio Gaussian wavepacket dynamics on the first excited-state surface of ammonia, we numerically confirm the conservation of geometric properties by these integrators and demonstrate that high-order integrators can enhance both accuracy and computational efficiency. We also compute the photoelectron spectrum of the difluorocarbene anion and the absorption spectrum of methylamine, and find that, in comparison with experiment, single-Hessian GWD outperforms global harmonic models and matches the accuracy of local harmonic GWD. Finally, we identify which spectral features are sensitive to the choice of reference Hessian.

AI.tldr: 本文提出单Hessian高斯波包动力学(SH-GWD)的新辛推导，证明其守恒非正则辛结构且无能量漂移，数值结果表明其与局部谐波变体具有相同渐近误差但计算更高效，并实现了高阶时间步进几何积分器以提升精度和效率。
AI.motivation: 减轻Heller局部谐波高斯波包动力学的计算负担，同时保持近似振动光谱的精度；并揭示单Hessian版本在几何结构守恒方面的优势。
AI.method: (1) 提供单Hessian GWD运动方程的新辛推导；(2) 证明其守恒非正则辛结构和能量；(3) 实现高阶时间可逆几何积分器；(4) 给出宽度和波包的精确演化表达式；(5) 在氨、二氟卡宾阴离子和甲胺体系中进行数值验证。
AI.result: 单Hessian GWD与局部谐波变体具有相同的𝒪(ℏ)渐近误差，但计算效率更高；高阶积分器提升精度和效率；在光电子谱和吸收谱计算中匹配实验精度，优于全局谐波模型。
AI.conclusion: 单Hessian GWD是一种兼顾计算效率和精度的动力学方法，具有守恒辛结构和能量的优势，适合振动光谱模拟；部分光谱特征对参考Hessian的选择敏感。

title: Finite temperature pair density wave superconductivity in $d$-wave altermagnets
comment: 13 pages, 10 figures. This manuscript supersedes arXiv:2603.25314
summary: We demonstrate that altermagnetism provides a field-free mechanism for stabilizing finite-momentum superconductivity in two dimensions. Using a non-perturbative static path approximation Monte Carlo approach, we show that a d-wave altermagnet supports a robust pair-density-wave (PDW) phase that persists over a finite temperature window despite strong thermal fluctuations. The underlying mechanism originates from momentum-dependent spin splitting, which effectively enhances pairing instabilities at finite center-of-mass momentum without Zeeman fields. We identify distinct thermal scales associated with phase coherence, gap closing, and pseudogap formation, and establish characteristic spectroscopic and real-space signatures of the PDW state. Our results reveal altermagnetism as a robust route to thermally stable finite-momentum superconductivity and provide experimentally testable signatures for altermagnetic materials.

AI.tldr: 本文利用非微扰静态路径近似蒙特卡洛方法，证明了d波交变磁体能够在二维中实现无外场的有限动量超导（配对密度波），并揭示了其热力学稳定存在的温度窗口及可实验验证的特征。
AI.motivation: 探索一种无需外加Zeeman场即可实现稳定有限动量超导（配对密度波）的机制，以克服传统方法对外部磁场的依赖。
AI.method: 采用非微扰静态路径近似蒙特卡洛方法（Static Path Approximation Monte Carlo），研究二维d波交变磁体中的超导配对行为。
AI.result: 发现d波交变磁体支持稳健的配对密度波（PDW）相，该相在有限温度窗口内稳定存在；识别出与相位相干、能隙闭合和赝能隙形成相关的三个不同热标度；获得了PDW态的特征谱学和实空间信号。
AI.conclusion: 交变磁体为热稳定的有限动量超导提供了一条鲁棒路径，并给出了在交变磁材料中可实验检验的超导特征。

title: Majorana bound states in chiral ferromagnet-superconductor heterostructures revisited
summary: Majorana zero modes are central to the pursuit of fault-tolerant topological quantum computation. While traditionally sought in one-dimensional hybrid nanowires, a robust alternative platform involves heterostructures combining superconductors with noncollinear magnets. This work focuses on a particularly promising system: a chiral ferromagnet hosting a magnetic skyrmion coupled to a superconducting film containing a superconducting vortex. Such skyrmion-vortex pairs have recently been realized experimentally and are theorized to harbor localized Majorana states, offering a potential pathway for braiding operations. We present a comprehensive theoretical analysis of the low-energy quasiparticle bound states in these heterostructures. Extending previous studies, we develop an analytical framework for the Majorana wavefunctions as well as the wavefunctions and spectrum of other lowlying states within a Bogoliubov-de Gennes approach. Our analytical results explicitly demonstrate the critical role of spin-orbit coupling for the stabilization of Majorana modes and provides approximate analytical expressions for low-lying states localized at the vortex, both with and without an accompanying skyrmion. The derived analytical results show excellent agreement with numerical simulations. We further elucidate the role of realistic effects, including vector potentials and texture perturbations from stray magnetic fields, to assess their impact.

AI.tldr: 本文对超导薄膜中磁斯格明子-涡旋对异质结构中的马约拉纳零模进行了全面的理论分析，建立了Bogoliubov-de Gennes框架下的解析波函数模型，并揭示了自旋轨道耦合的关键作用。
AI.motivation: 传统一维纳米线中的马约拉纳零模实现面临挑战，而最近实验实现的斯格明子-涡旋对异质结构被认为可能束缚马约拉纳态，为拓扑量子计算中的编织操作提供了新途径。
AI.method: 采用Bogoliubov-de Gennes方法，发展了解析框架来描述马约拉纳波函数及其他低能束缚态的波函数和能谱，并通过数值模拟验证了解析结果。
AI.result: 解析结果明确证明了自旋轨道耦合对马约拉纳模稳定化的关键作用；给出了有无斯格明子陪伴下涡旋局域低能态的近似解析表达式；解析结果与数值模拟高度吻合。
AI.conclusion: 该研究阐明了矢量势和杂散磁场等实际效应对体系的影响，为基于斯格明子-涡旋对异质结构实现拓扑量子计算提供了理论基础。

title: Breakdown of Adiabatic Scaling and Noise-Induced Functional Synchronization in Deeply Quiescent Excitable Systems
summary: Coherence resonance (CR) characterizes noise-induced regularity in excitable systems, yet its evaluation in quiescent biological media is often obscured by flattened energy landscapes and complex nonlinear dynamics. In this study, we investigate the stochastic dynamics of a 3D Sherman-Rinzel-Keizer (SRK) model driven by multiplicative Feller noise. We show that traditional extremal evaluations of CR encounter a "bathtub effect" a broad resonance valley that can lead to statistical inaccuracies. To address this, we propose a logarithmic centroid extraction method, which filters out stochastic jitter and recovers the underlying adiabatic Kramers scaling with high linearity (R^2 > 0.95). Furthermore, we identify the physical boundary where this adiabatic approximation breaks down under the strong-noise limit. Extending our analysis to gap-junction coupled systems, we observe a noise-induced transition from sub-threshold physiological shivering (characterized by statistical correlation but negligible functional output) to macroscopic functional synchronization. Our results provide a mathematical framework for extracting optimal noise intensities in broad energy valleys and offer insights into how quiescent biological systems utilize stochastic fluctuations for functional recovery

AI.tldr: 本研究针对3D Sherman-Rinzel-Keizer（SRK）模型中的乘性Feller噪声驱动随机动力学，发现传统极值评估方法会出现“浴缸效应”——一个宽阔的共振谷导致统计不准确。为此提出对数质心提取方法，有效滤除随机抖动，恢复绝热Kramers标度（R² > 0.95），并识别了强噪声极限下绝热近似失效的物理边界。在间隙连接耦合系统中，观察到从亚阈值生理性颤抖（统计相关但功能输出可忽略）到宏观功能同步的噪声诱导转变。
AI.motivation: 传统相干共振（CR）评估方法在平坦能量景观和复杂非线性动力学的静止生物介质中表现不佳，存在“浴缸效应”导致统计不准确，需要新的数学框架来提取最佳噪声强度。
AI.method: 提出对数质心提取方法（logarithmic centroid extraction method），用于滤除随机抖动并恢复绝热Kramers标度；在3D SRK模型中分析乘性Feller噪声驱动下的随机动力学。
AI.result: 对数质心提取方法在高线性度（R² > 0.95）下恢复绝热Kramers标度；识别了强噪声极限下绝热近似失效的物理边界；观察到噪声诱导的从亚阈值颤抖到宏观功能同步的转变。
AI.conclusion: 本研究提供了在宽能量谷中提取最佳噪声强度的数学框架，并揭示了静止生物系统如何利用随机波动实现功能恢复的机制。

title: Disentangling bulk and surface electronic structure using targeted cleave planes in RuO$_2$
summary: Rutile RuO$_2$ has attracted significant interest due to its putative unconventional electronic and magnetic properties and its proximity to superconductivity. However, the measurement and interpretation of its electronic structure has been complicated by a strongly three-dimensional crystal structure. Here, we demonstrate how the preparation of targeted $(110)$ and $(100)$ surfaces via focused ion beam (FIB)-engineered cleaving allows the acquisition of high-quality measurements of the electronic structure using angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy. Our results demonstrate that ARPES spectra of RuO$_2$ are, in fact, largely dominated by signatures of distinct surface electronic states. From comparison with density-functional theory, we resolve a surface termination-dependent variation of these, and disentangle them from highly-three-dimensional bulk states and surface resonances. Moreover, we find a marked role of the substantial spin-orbit coupling of the Ru 4$d$ orbitals in the surface region, where a breaking of spatial inversion symmetry leads to significant Rashba-type spin splittings of the surface bands.

AI.tldr: 本文通过聚焦离子束（FIB）工程解理技术制备RuO₂的(110)和(100)表面，利用角分辨光电子能谱（ARPES）测量其电子结构，发现ARPES谱主要被表面电子态主导，并解析了表面终止依赖的变化、三维体态与表面共振态的区分，以及表面区域Rashba型自旋分裂现象。
AI.motivation: RuO₂因其潜在的非传统电子/磁性质及超导电性近邻性而备受关注，但其强三维晶体结构使电子结构的测量与解释变得复杂，亟需有效方法获取高质量测量数据。
AI.method: 利用FIB工程解理技术制备RuO₂的(110)和(100)特定表面，结合ARPES进行高质量电子结构测量，并与密度泛函理论（DFT）计算结果对比分析。
AI.result: RuO₂的ARPES谱主要被表面电子态主导；表面终止依赖导致电子态变化；成功区分了高度三维的体态、表面共振态与纯表面态；发现表面区域因空间反演对称性破缺导致Ru 4d轨道的强自旋-轨道耦合引发显著的Rashba型自旋分裂。
AI.conclusion: FIB工程解理结合ARPES是解析强三维材料RuO₂电子结构的有效手段，表面效应和自旋-轨道耦合在其电子结构中起关键作用。

title: Fine-tuning a vision-language model for fracture-surface morphology recognition
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) have shown strong potential for scientific image understanding, but general-purpose models often lack the domain-specific visual knowledge required for reliable materials characterization. In this work, we fine-tuned an open-source VLM (Qwen3-VL-32B-Instruct) for fracture-surface image analysis using a curated dataset of 13,168 open-source, literature-mined fracture-surface images. Morphology annotations were generated by GPT-5.2-Reasoning (high) from both the images and relevant excerpts of their source papers, and the dataset was further enriched with targeted manual collection and rotation-based augmentation. The resulting specialist model outperforms flagship proprietary multimodal models on a benchmark of 100 manually annotated images. It achieves a precision of 0.92, compared to 0.35 for the base Qwen3-VL-32B-Instruct, 0.58 for GPT-5.5-Reasoning (high), and 0.78 for Gemini 3.1 Pro-Reasoning (high). Dataset ablations show that manual collection of rare-feature images and augmentation via image rotation are both beneficial to improve recognition of less common fracture morphology features. We further discuss integrated use of the fine-tuned model with proprietary models to combine fracture-specific visual accuracy with broader multimodal reasoning for autonomous fractography. Although focused on fracture-surface images, this work demonstrates how VLMs can be adapted through targeted collection and fine-tuning on novel feature images to recognize those features and support downstream decision-making in autonomous microscopy workflows.

AI.tldr: 本文通过微调开源VLM（Qwen3-VL-32B），利用13,168张文献挖掘的断口图像数据集，结合GPT-5.2标注和旋转增强，训练出断口表面图像分析专家模型，在人工标注基准上达到0.92精度，远超基础模型（0.35）和GPT-5.5（0.58）、Gemini 3.1 Pro（0.78）等专有模型。
AI.motivation: 通用视觉语言模型缺乏材料科学领域特定的视觉知识，难以可靠地用于材料表征（如断口表面分析），因此需要领域特化的模型。
AI.method: 1) 从文献中挖掘13,168张开源断口图像；2) 使用GPT-5.2-Reasoning结合图像和论文摘要生成形态标注；3) 辅以人工收集稀有特征图像和旋转增强；4) 对Qwen3-VL-32B-Instruct进行微调。
AI.result: 专家模型在100张人工标注图像基准上达到0.92精度，基础Qwen3-VL为0.35，GPT-5.5为0.58，Gemini 3.1 Pro为0.78。消融实验证实稀有特征人工收集和旋转增强均有助于识别不常见断口形态。
AI.conclusion: 通过针对性数据收集和微调，VLMs可被改造为识别领域特定特征的专家模型，支持自主显微镜工作流中的决策。本文方法可推广至其他材料科学图像分析任务。

title: Selectivity- and Activity-Aware Catalyst Descriptors for CO$_2$ Hydrogenation on Alloy Nanocatalysts using Machine-Learned Force Fields
comment: 30 pages, 5 figures + 1 toc, 2 tables, Supplementary Information
summary: Adsorption energy distributions (AEDs) have emerged as a powerful and increasingly adopted descriptor for catalytic performance in high-entropy alloys and, more recently, in conventional metallic alloy nanocrystal catalysts. By accounting for diverse adsorption sites and crystallographic facets, AEDs more fully represent nanoparticle-based catalytic surfaces and show strong promise for accelerating rational design and discovery of heterogeneous catalysts, especially for CO$_2$ hydrogenation. However, previous approaches have not sufficiently resolved facet-specific contributions, despite the catalytic significance and prevalence of certain Miller planes in nanoscale catalysts, limiting their applicability in predicting activity and selectivity. Here, we introduce an updated facet-resolved framework for predicting catalytic activity, which also enables insight into selectivity toward C1 products. Universal machine-learned force fields trained on Open Catalyst Project data were employed to compute adsorption energetics across 226 experimentally observed metals, binary alloys, and ternary alloys, encompassing 1.4 million adsorption sites on 2,626 crystallographically distinct surfaces. Using statistical and unsupervised learning techniques, we analyzed facet-specific AEDs to identify highly active and methanol-selective facets. Our approach provides insight into the relationship between structure and catalytic performance metrics like activity and selectivity, and presents a set of alloy compositions and their respective surface orientations for experimental validation toward highly selective CO$_2$ hydrogenation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的晶面分辨吸附能分布（AED）框架，利用通用机器学习势场计算226种金属及合金的140万吸附位点，通过统计分析识别高活性和甲醇选择性的晶面，为CO₂加氢反应的催化剂理性设计提供指导。
AI.motivation: 以往的AED方法未能充分分辨不同晶面对催化性能的贡献，限制了其在预测活性和选择性方面的适用性，尤其是在CO₂加氢反应中。
AI.method: 使用基于Open Catalyst Project数据训练的通用机器学习势场，计算226种金属、二元及三元合金在2626个晶体学表面上共计140万吸附位点的吸附能。通过统计和无监督学习分析晶面特异性AED，识别高活性和甲醇选择性晶面。
AI.result: 成功建立了晶面分辨的AED框架，识别出具有高活性和甲醇选择性的特定晶面，并给出可供实验验证的合金组成及表面取向组合。
AI.conclusion: 该框架不仅能预测催化活性，还能提供对C1产物选择性的洞察，揭示了结构与催化性能（活性和选择性）之间的关系，为高选择性CO₂加氢催化剂的理性设计提供了数据驱动的方向。

title: Water adsorption on a model silicate surface: wollastonite (100)
summary: Water adsorption on silicate surfaces is a critical yet poorly understood process relevant to, e.g., mineral weathering and cement hydration. This study investigates the structure of water overlayers on a model calcium silicate, the lowest-energy (100) surface of wollastonite (CaSiO3). It combines atomically resolved non-contact atomic force microscopy (nc-AFM), acquired with qPlus sensors and functionalized tips in ultrahigh vacuum (UHV), with density functional theory (DFT) calculations employing the metaGGA r2SCAN+rVV10 functional. Adding incremental doses of water to the sample at cryogenic temperatures produces distinct structures governed by the competition between water-surface and water-water interactions. With two water molecules per surface unit cell, water-surface interactions dominate: In line with previous theoretical predictions, adsorbates follow the surface lattice. As the coverage increases, intermolecular hydrogen bonding competes with bonding to the surface, leading to the emergence of complex, coexisting patterns. While their small energy differences prevent an unambiguous identification of the most stable structure by DFT, the experimentally observed symmetries help constrain plausible structural models. Above a critical density of four water molecules per unit cell, water-water interactions prevail, and water clusters are formed. The results provide an atomic-scale framework for understanding water interactions with calcium silicate surfaces.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过高分辨率原子力显微镜和密度泛函理论计算，系统揭示了水分子在硅酸钙（硅灰石）表面的吸附行为，发现随着水覆盖度增加，水-表面相互作用逐渐被水-水氢键竞争取代，最终形成水团簇结构。
AI.motivation: 硅酸盐表面水吸附是矿物风化和水泥水化等过程中的关键基础问题，但目前对其原子尺度机制的理解仍然不足。
AI.method: 结合非接触式原子力显微镜（nc-AFM，qPlus传感器，功能化针尖）和密度泛函理论（DFT，metaGGA r2SCAN+rVV10泛函），在超高真空低温条件下对水分子在硅灰石(100)表面的吸附进行系统研究。
AI.result: 低覆盖度（2个水分子/晶胞）时水-表面相互作用主导，水分子沿表面晶格排列；中等覆盖度时水分子间氢键与表面键合竞争，形成多种共存结构；高覆盖度（≥4个水分子/晶胞）时水-水相互作用占优，形成水团簇。
AI.conclusion: 为理解水与硅酸钙表面的原子尺度相互作用提供了框架，揭示了覆盖度驱动的相互作用竞争机制。

title: Nonadiabatic Theory of Phonon Magnetic Moments in Insulators and Metals
summary: We develop a nonadiabatic theory of phonon magnetic moments applicable to both insulators and metals. By relating the phonon magnetic moment to the force-velocity response of ions in a magnetic field, we derive a gauge-invariant expression using a gauge-covariant Wigner expansion. The formalism naturally separates Fermi-sea and Fermi-surface contributions and captures the full dependence on phonon frequency. In gapped systems, our theory reduces to previous adiabatic expressions in the low-frequency limit. Beyond this limit, it reveals additional contributions arising from resonant interband processes and the Fermi surface. Applying our theory to Pb$_{1-x}$Sn$_x$Te, we find that the Fermi-surface contribution substantially enhances the phonon magnetic moment, reproducing the same order of magnitude as the experimental observation. Our results provide a unified framework for describing phonon magnetic moments beyond the adiabatic regime.

AI.tldr: 本文发展了一个适用于绝缘体和金属的非绝热声子磁矩理论，通过将声子磁矩与磁场中离子的力-速度响应相关联，推导出规范不变的表达式，并成功应用于Pb₁₋ₓSnₓTe体系，发现费米面贡献显著增强了声子磁矩。
AI.motivation: 现有的声子磁矩理论主要局限于绝热近似（低频极限），缺乏一个统一的、适用于绝缘体和金属、且能处理非绝热效应的理论框架。
AI.method: 通过建立声子磁矩与磁场中离子力-速度响应的关系，利用规范协变的Wigner展开推导出规范不变的表达式，并自然地分离出费米海和费米面贡献。
AI.result: 在有能隙体系中，低频频限下理论退化为已有的绝热表达式；超出该极限时，揭示出共振带间过程和费米面的额外贡献。在Pb₁₋ₓSnₓTe中，费米面贡献显著增强了声子磁矩，与实验观测数量级一致。
AI.conclusion: 该工作提供了一个超越绝热体制的描述声子磁矩的统一理论框架。

title: Does a Fractional Quantum Hall Edge Have a Protected Intrinsic Dipole Moment?
summary: We investigate the claims by Park and Haldane [Phys. Rev. B 90, 045123 (2014)] of an intrinsic protected value of the electric dipole moment at the physical edge of fractional quantum Hall (FQH) systems. Contrary to prevailing expectations, we find that the edge dipole takes the expected intrinsic value only in certain very special cases. We identify key limitations in earlier numerical studies and employ density matrix renormalization group (DMRG) methods to accurately compute the ground-state dipole. We focus on three representative systems: the $ν=1/3$-vacuum edge, the $ν=2/3$-vacuum edge, and the interface between Pfaffian and anti-Pfaffian phases. We find that the expected intrinsic dipole value occurs only at $ν=1/3$, whereas the other systems do not exhibit the claimed intrinsic value. We give arguments based on composite fermions as to why hierarchy states should generally not have protected intrinsic dipoles. These results have important implications for the energetics and edge structure of FQH states.

AI.tldr: 本文通过DMRG数值计算，质疑了Park和Haldane关于分数量子霍尔（FQH）系统边缘电偶极矩具有内在受保护值的说法，发现仅在ν=1/3的特殊情况下才成立，而其他体系（ν=2/3及Pfaffian/anti-Pfaffian界面）并不支持这一论断，并基于复合费米子理论解释了为何层级态通常不具有受保护的内在偶极矩。
AI.motivation: 验证Park和Haldane提出的FQH系统物理边缘电偶极矩具有内在受保护值的论断是否普遍成立，并澄清此前数值研究的局限性。
AI.method: 采用密度矩阵重整化群（DMRG）方法精确计算基态偶极矩，重点关注ν=1/3-真空边缘、ν=2/3-真空边缘以及Pfaffian与anti-Pfaffian相界面这三个代表性系统。
AI.result: 仅在ν=1/3边缘观察到预期的内在偶极值，而ν=2/3边缘和Pfaffian/anti-Pfaffian界面均未呈现所声称的内在受保护偶极矩。
AI.conclusion: 层级态（如ν=2/3）通常不具有受保护的内在边缘电偶极矩，这对FQH系统的边缘结构和能量学有重要启示。

title: Emergence of Tsallis Statistics from a Self-Referential Nonlinear Operator: A Variational Framework
comment: 18 pages, 1 figure. Companion paper on dynamical aspects and H-theorem (submitted separately to arXiv)
summary:
We develop a variational thermodynamic framework for statistical systems governed by a self-referential nonlinear operator Omega characterized by structural exponents alpha > 0, beta >= 0, a symmetric kernel K, and a self-coupling constant kappa >= 0. The central object is the self-consistency entropy S[Psi] = -D_KL(Psi || Omega Psi), which vanishes at the fixed points of Omega and serves as a natural Lyapunov functional.
  Within the local kernel (mean-field) approximation, minimization of the free energy F = U - T S admits the Tsallis q-exponential distribution as an equilibrium state, with the entropic index q = alpha + beta emerging directly from the fixed-point structure of the operator rather than being postulated. The framework yields a consistent thermodynamic description, including a generalized equation of state PV = (2 - q) T, response functions, and a critical temperature associated with spontaneous symmetry breaking.
  The relation q = alpha + beta connects independently measurable structural exponents of the feedback mechanism to the observed tail index, providing a parameter-free criterion that distinguishes this approach from superstatistics, constrained entropy maximization, and q-deformed formalisms. This work establishes an operator-theoretic foundation for nonextensive statistical mechanics in which nonlinear self-referential feedback naturally generates Tsallis statistics in the mean-field limit.

AI.tldr: 本文建立了一个基于自指非线性算子的变分热力学框架，证明在平均场极限下Tsallis q-指数分布自然出现，其中熵指标q = α + β直接源于算子的不动点结构，为广义统计力学提供了算子理论基础。
AI.motivation: 现有非广延统计力学（如Tsallis统计）中，熵指标q通常是人为假设或事后拟合的，缺乏微观动力学基础。作者希望从自指非线性反馈机制出发，为q的起源提供算子理论解释。
AI.method: 构建了一个自指非线性算子Ω（具有结构指数α>0, β≥0、对称核K和自耦合常数κ≥0），定义自洽熵S[Ψ] = -D_KL(Ψ || ΩΨ)作为Lyapunov泛函。在局域核（平均场）近似下，通过自由能F = U - T S的最小化导出平衡态分布。
AI.result: 平衡态分布为Tsallis q-指数分布，其中q = α + β；得到广义状态方程PV = (2 - q)T；推导了响应函数和自发对称破缺临界温度。q = α + β建立了可测量的结构指数与观测尾指数之间的无参数关系。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为非线性自指反馈机制产生Tsallis统计提供了严格的算子理论基础，区别于超统计、约束熵最大化和q-变形形式主义，为无广延统计力学建立了第一性原理框架。

title: Physics Aware Representation Learning on Electronic Charge Density for Materials Property Prediction
summary: The fundamental quantity governing the mechanical and thermodynamic properties of a crystalline solid is its electronic charge density. Yet, its direct use for the rapid prediction of materials properties remains challenging due to its high dimensionality. Here, we present a physics-informed deep learning framework that directly predicts mechanical and thermodynamic properties from the three-dimensional electronic charge density derived from density functional theory (DFT). The proposed approach first utilizes a three-dimensional convolutional autoencoder for unsupervised dimensionality reduction, compressing a high-resolution charge-density grid (128 x 128 x 128) into a compact latent representation (16 x 16 x 16 x 16) while preserving physically meaningful features, as confirmed by negligible reconstruction errors across diverse crystal systems. The compressed latent-space representation of charge density is then used by two different regression models for property prediction: Light Gradient Boosting Machine (LightGBM) and Attention-based 3D Convolutional Neural Networks (Att CNN), and their performance is compared. Combining composition-based descriptors (Material Agnostic Platform for Informatics and Exploration or MAGPIE) with electronic charge density data further improves the model accuracy. Using a dataset of about 6059 inorganic compounds spanning multiple crystal symmetries, the models achieve strong predictive performance for bulk modulus K (R2 = 0.94), Young's modulus E (R2 = 0.88), shear modulus G (R2 = 0.87), formation energy Eform (R2 = 0.96), and Debye temperature Θ (R2 = 0.89). This work establishes electronic charge density as a transferable, physics-grounded descriptor for materials property prediction, requiring ~ 1/25 the computational resources of full-fledged DFT calculations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个物理信息深度学习框架，直接从三维电子电荷密度预测晶体材料的力学和热力学性质。使用3D卷积自编码器将高维电荷密度压缩为潜变量表示，再结合LightGBM和注意力3D CNN进行性质预测，在6059种无机化合物上实现了高精度（如体模量R²=0.94），计算资源仅为完整DFT计算的1/25。
AI.motivation: 电子电荷密度是决定晶体力学和热力学性质的基本物理量，但其高维特性阻碍了直接用于快速材料性质预测。现有方法多依赖人工描述符或结构特征，缺乏直接基于电荷密度的端到端预测框架。
AI.method: 1) 使用3D卷积自编码器将128×128×128电荷密度网格降维至16×16×16×16潜变量表示；2) 采用LightGBM和注意力3D CNN两种回归模型进行性质预测；3) 结合MAGPIE组成描述符进一步提升精度。
AI.result: 在6059种无机化合物上，体模量R²=0.94，杨氏模量R²=0.88，剪切模量R²=0.87，形成能R²=0.96，德拜温度R²=0.89。计算资源仅为完整DFT的1/25。
AI.conclusion: 电子电荷密度可作为可迁移、有物理基础的描述符用于材料性质预测，为高通量材料筛选提供了高效且准确的替代方案。

title: Topological superconductivity in a Hubbard model for twisted bilayer cuprates
comment: 7 pages, 7 figures. Associated data can be found at https://osf.io/em9n8/overview
summary: We investigate the emergence of nontrivial topology in a twisted cuprate bilayer described by the Hubbard model in the weak-interaction regime. Our results show that the topological character depends sensitively on the doping level. For $U/t=3.85$, the Chern number assumes a value of $\pm 8$ in the electron-doped case, whereas it vanishes (0) in the hole-doped regime. The presence of nontrivial topology is further supported by an analysis the associated edge states and their chirality in a finite-width geometry, while keeping full correlations.

AI.tldr: 本文研究弱相互作用Hubbard模型描述的扭转铜氧化物双层膜中非平凡拓扑的出现，发现拓扑特性依赖于掺杂水平：在电子掺杂下Chern数为±8，空穴掺杂下为0，并通过边缘态和手性分析进一步确认。
AI.motivation: 探索扭转铜氧化物双层膜中非平凡拓扑性质的产生条件，特别是掺杂水平对拓扑相的影响。
AI.method: 基于Hubbard模型（弱相互作用 regime, U/t=3.85），在不同掺杂水平（电子掺杂与空穴掺杂）下计算Chern数，并通过有限宽度几何中的边缘态及其手性分析验证拓扑性质。
AI.result: 电子掺杂下Chern数为±8（非平凡拓扑），空穴掺杂下Chern数为0（平凡拓扑）；边缘态及其手性特征进一步支持了非平凡拓扑的存在。
AI.conclusion: 扭转铜氧化物双层膜的拓扑性质对掺杂水平高度敏感，电子掺杂可实现非平凡拓扑相，而空穴掺杂则不能。

title: Coherent Nonreciprocal Valley Transport in Dirac/Weyl Semimetals
summary: Nonreciprocal electronic transport, defined as a directional asymmetry between the forward and backward two-terminal responses, typically requires a built-in inversion-breaking feature of the host material or an applied field, such as magnetic order, magnetochiral coupling, polar lattice distortion, or a superconducting state. Here, we show that a single electrostatic barrier whose shape lacks inversion symmetry can drive coherent nonreciprocal transport in a Dirac or Weyl channel without any of these ingredients. The mechanism is geometric: across a barrier with two qualitatively distinct refraction interfaces (one vertical and one oblique), forward- and backward-propagating wave packets experience different Fermi-surface-mismatch sequences at the entrance and exit faces. Using coherent split-operator Dirac wave-packet simulations with realistic device parameters, we show that in a channel with isotropic (untilted) energy dispersion, an inversion-asymmetric (right-angle) triangular barrier produces strong charge-mode rectification, establishing its purely geometric origin. Adding a Dirac-cone tilt turns the same shape into a coherent valley-resolved diode whose dichroic structure flips sign across the Dirac point. Strikingly, a mirror-symmetric (isosceles) triangle with two oblique faces exhibits valley-polarized transmission while remaining exactly reciprocal. Oblique interfaces and tilt together do not suffice; the essential ingredient is a sequence of geometrically distinct interface types.

AI.tldr: 研究发现，在狄拉克或外尔通道中，单一的非反演对称静电势垒（如直角三角形）即可产生非互易电子输运，其机制完全来自几何效应而非材料本征属性。直角三角形势垒产生强电荷整流，倾斜狄拉克锥可转化为谷分辨二极管，而对称的等腰三角形虽保持互易却能实现谷极化输运。
AI.motivation: 传统非互易输运需要材料本身具有反演对称破缺特性（如磁序、极性格点畸变等），作者希望探索是否仅通过几何结构（非对称势垒形状）即可实现非互易输运，而不依赖任何材料本征属性或外加场。
AI.method: 采用相干分裂算符狄拉克波包模拟，在狄拉克/外尔通道中构建具有不同界面类型的静电势垒（直角三角形、等腰三角形），通过分析波包在入射面和出射面经历的费米面失配序列差异，研究输运的非互易性。
AI.result: 1) 非反演对称的直角三角形势垒在无能带倾斜的系统中产生强电荷整流；2) 加入狄拉克锥倾斜后，同一形状变为谷分辨二极管，其二色性结构在狄拉克点处翻转符号；3) 镜像对称的等腰三角形（两个倾斜界面）产生谷极化输运但保持严格互易；4) 纯倾斜界面不足以产生非互易，关键是需要几何上不同类型的界面序列。
AI.conclusion: 非互易电子输运可通过纯几何机制实现——势垒两侧界面类型不同导致正反向波包经历不同费米面失配序列。这一发现揭示了非互易输运的新物理起源，为设计无需特殊材料属性的谷电子学器件提供了新思路。

title: Fluctuation-driven chiral ferromagnetism
summary: In general, quantum fluctuations are suppressed in ferromagnetic materials because they admit a simple unfrustrated ground state, greatly limiting the scope of phenomena that can be observed in these materials. In this work, we show how magnetization-non-conserving couplings fundamentally alter this paradigm by demonstrating the existence of a chiral ferromagnet that is stabilized by quantum fluctuations. More specifically, we show how these spin-orbit interactions modify the classical phase diagram; whereas a classical analysis predicts only collinear states, we observe fluctuation-stabilized phases, including a ferromagnet with large orbital chirality and a chiral stripe regime. We elucidate how such couplings spontaneously generate a scalar orbital chirality, in contrast to conventional mechanisms which rely upon a field-induced canting of vector chiral order. The resultant chiral states exhibit distinct transport signatures, namely an enhanced thermal Hall effect, and are of direct relevance to moiré heterostructures, Rydberg-atom arrays, and solid-state materials featuring non-Kramers spins.

AI.tldr: 该工作证明了自旋-轨道耦合（磁化不守恒）可以打破铁磁体通常无量子涨落的常规，使量子涨落稳定手性铁磁态和手性条纹相，并产生增强的热霍尔效应等独特输运特征。
AI.motivation: 铁磁体通常因基态无阻挫而抑制量子涨落，导致可观察的量子现象有限。作者希望展示磁化不守恒耦合如何改变这一范式，寻找量子涨落稳定的新奇手性态。
AI.method: 通过分析自旋-轨道耦合修正经典相图，对比经典分析与量子涨落稳定相，研究标量轨道手性的自发产生机制。
AI.result: 发现了量子涨落稳定的手性铁磁体和手性条纹相；揭示了标量轨道手性的自发产生（区别于传统场致矢量手性倾转机制）；这些手性态表现出增强的热霍尔效应。
AI.conclusion: 磁化不守恒的耦合从根本上拓展了铁磁体中量子现象的范围，对moire异质结、里德伯原子阵列和非Kramers自旋固态材料具有直接意义。

title: Direct Experimental Test of Conformal Invariance via Grazing Scattering: A Proposal for X-ray and Neutron Experiments
summary: We propose a test of conformal invariance in critical phenomena based on the study of a two-point correlation function in the presence of a boundary. This two-point function can be studied using X-ray or neutron scattering in the conditions of total reflection (so-called grazing scattering). The conformal Ward identity in momentum space is here expressed as a differential constraint on the scattering cross-section, as a function of the momentum transfer and the scattering angle. Experimental verification, using e.g. binary alloys, appears well within the existing techniques. This would be the first direct experimental test of conformal invariance in critical phenomena, a symmetry widely assumed but never directly verified.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于边界存在下两点关联函数的共形不变性测试方法，该方法可通过X射线或中子散射在掠射条件下实现，并通过共形Ward恒等式在动量空间中的微分约束来验证临界现象中的共形对称性。
AI.motivation: 共形不变性在临界现象理论中被广泛假设，但从未被直接实验验证过。作者希望填补这一空白，为这一基本对称性提供首个直接的实验检验。
AI.method: 研究边界存在下的两点关联函数，利用X射线或中子散射在全反射条件（掠射散射）下进行测量；将共形Ward恒等式表达为动量空间中散射截面关于动量转移和散射角的微分约束，从而通过实验数据检验该约束是否成立。
AI.result: 推导出共形Ward恒等式在动量空间中的微分约束形式，并指出使用二元合金等体系进行实验验证在现有技术条件下是可行的。
AI.conclusion: 该方案有望成为临界现象中共形不变性的首个直接实验验证，共形对称性虽被广泛假设但此前从未得到直接检验。

title: Physics-informed operator learning for transferable energy-dissipative microstructure dynamics
summary: Phase-field simulations provide mechanistic descriptions of microstructure evolution, but repeated high-fidelity integration over long horizons and broad parameter spaces remains computationally expensive. We present PFNet, a physics-informed neural operator framework that advances microstructural states by learning conditional evolution operators rather than direct correlations. PFNet combines a diffusion-inspired U-Net with periodic padding, entropy-based state conditioning and thermodynamic-parameter modulation to encode boundary consistency, instantaneous ordering state and changes in the free-energy landscape. For Cahn-Hilliard coarsening, PFNet achieves accurate one-step prediction and stable autoregressive rollouts across composition, gradient-energy coefficient, coarsening stage and morphology class, with errors concentrated near diffuse interfaces and topology-changing regions. The same framework extends to a four-channel martensitic-transformation benchmark without martensite-specific redesign. These results indicate that physics-informed operator learning can provide transferable surrogates for phase-field dynamics and broader energy-dissipative dynamical systems.

AI.tldr: PFNet是一个物理信息神经算子框架，通过学习条件演化算子来加速相场模拟，在Cahn-Hilliard粗化和马氏体相变基准上实现了准确预测与稳定自回归 rollout，证明了算符学习可为能量耗散动力学系统提供可迁移的替代模型。
AI.motivation: 高保真相场模拟在长时间尺度和宽参数空间上计算成本极高，需要更高效的替代方法。
AI.method: 提出 PFNet，结合扩散启发式 U-Net、周期性填充、熵基状态调节和热力学参数调制，学习条件演化算子而非直接相关性映射。
AI.result: 在 Cahn-Hilliard 粗化中实现精确单步预测和稳定自回归 rollout，误差集中在扩散界面和拓扑变化区域；无需重新设计即可扩展到四通道马氏体相变基准。
AI.conclusion: 物理信息算子学习能够为相场动力学及更广泛的能量耗散动力系统提供可迁移的替代模型。

title: Noncollinear antiferromagnetic structure and physical properties of CrRhAs with distorted kagome lattice
comment: 8 pages, 5 figures. Published in PHYSICAL REVIEW B 113, 184430 (2026)
summary: CrRhAs was theoretically proposed to be a kagome metal with unusual magnetic ground states; however, little is known about its magnetic structure and physical properties experimentally. Here, we present an experimental investigation of CrRhAs with ZrNiAl-type structure and a distorted Cr kagome lattice. CrRhAs is an antiferromagnet with TN = 149 K. Powder neutron diffraction analysis reveals a noncollinear antiferromagnetic structure with propagation vector k = (1/3, 1/3, 1/2), which features a ferromagnetic second nearest neighbor coupling in the kagome plane that is different from the prediction in previous density functional theory calculations. Furthermore, CrRhAs exhibits anomalous electrical transport properties which are possibly related to multiband effects and strong spin fluctuations. For the temperature-dependent longitudinal resistivity \r{ho}xx, it is semiconductinglike above TN and becomes metallic below TN . The Hall coefficients exhibit two sign changes near 70 and 300 K. Combined with the results of heat capacity measurements, a large Kadowaki-Woods ratio α = 33.9 μΩ cm mol2 K2/J2 is obtained. The above results suggest CrRhAs is a strongly correlated kagome metal with multiband and noncollinear magnetic structure features.

AI.tldr: 本文实验研究了CrRhAs这种具有扭曲Cr kagome晶格的金属材料，发现其为非共线反铁磁体（TN = 149 K），具有独特的磁结构（k = (1/3, 1/3, 1/2)），表现出异常的电输运性质和多带效应，并具有较大的Kadowaki-Woods比值（α = 33.9 μΩ cm mol² K²/J²），表明它是一种强关联kagome金属。
AI.motivation: CrRhAs理论上被预测为具有非常规磁基态的kagome金属，但实验上对其磁结构和物理性质知之甚少。本文旨在通过实验手段填补这一空白。
AI.method: 采用粉末中子衍射分析磁结构；测量温度依赖的纵向电阻率ρxx和霍尔系数；进行热容测量。
AI.result: 1) CrRhAs为反铁磁体，TN = 149 K；2) 非共线反铁磁结构，传播矢量 k = (1/3, 1/3, 1/2)，kagome面内铁磁次近邻耦合与DFT预测不同；3) ρxx在TN以上呈类半导体行为，TN以下呈金属行为；4) 霍尔系数在70 K和300 K附近出现两次符号变化；5) Kadowaki-Woods比值 α = 33.9 μΩ cm mol² K²/J²。
AI.conclusion: CrRhAs是一种强关联kagome金属，具有多带和非共线磁结构特征，其磁结构与理论预测不同，暗示需要更深入的理论理解。

title: Floquet second-order topological insulator in strained graphene
comment: 5 pages,4 figures,accepted for publication as a Letter in Phys. Rev. B
summary: Graphene provides a canonical setting for Floquet band engineering, where circularly polarized light can dynamically open topological gaps at Dirac points and generate nonequilibrium Hall responses. Here we show that uniaxial strain and off-resonant circularly polarized light with tunable incidence angle enable a controllable route to Floquet higher-order topology in graphene. Using a strained honeycomb tight-binding model with Peierls coupling and a high-frequency expansion for the effective Floquet Hamiltonian, we find that strain drives the Dirac cones toward the Dirac-merging (semi-Dirac) critical regime, where the light-induced mass becomes strongly anisotropic. For oblique incidence, the projected drive is effectively elliptically polarized and, in combination with strain, stabilizes a phase with gapped edges but robust in-gap corner modes in finite geometries, realizing a Floquet second-order topological insulator. We characterize the phase diagram via the Chern number and a crystalline-symmetry-quantized polarization invariant. Finally, first-principles-informed tight-binding calculations corroborate the predicted topological evolution in strained graphene nanostructures. Our results identify driven strained graphene as a realistic and tunable platform for realizing and diagnosing Floquet higher-order topological phases.

AI.tldr: 本文提出在应变石墨烯中，通过可调入射角的非共振圆偏振光，可以实现弗洛凯高阶拓扑绝缘体相，其特征为能隙边缘但存在稳健的角态。
AI.motivation: 石墨烯是弗洛凯能带工程的经典平台，但现有研究多集中于常规拓扑态。作者希望探索如何利用应变和倾斜入射光的组合，在石墨烯中实现高阶拓扑相（如二阶拓扑绝缘体），拓展弗洛凯工程的拓扑可能性。
AI.method: 采用应变蜂窝紧束缚模型，通过Peierls耦合引入光场，利用高频展开得到有效弗洛凯哈密顿量。分析狄拉克锥在应变下的合并（半狄拉克）临界行为，以及斜入射产生的有效椭圆偏振光效应。通过陈数和极化不变量刻画相图，并用第一性原理指导的紧束缚计算验证。
AI.result: 发现应变驱使狄拉克锥向合并临界点移动，导致光诱导质量呈现强各向异性。斜入射下，投影驱动等效为椭圆偏振，与应变协同稳定了一种具有能隙边缘但存在稳健角态的相，即弗洛凯二阶拓扑绝缘体。
AI.conclusion: 应变石墨烯与可调入射角的圆偏振光结合，为实验实现和探测弗洛凯高阶拓扑相提供了现实可行的可调谐平台。

title: Bootstrapping ground state properties of classical frustrated magnets
summary: We introduce a method based on semidefinite programming that produces rigorous two-sided bounds on ground state energy densities and correlation functions of translation-invariant classical spin models on infinite lattices. In this method, the challenge of non-convex optimization on an infinite lattice is replaced with a hierarchy of finite-size convex optimizations arising from positivity conditions that any probability distribution over spin configurations must satisfy. This adapts the Lasserre hierarchy in the theory of polynomial optimization to the context of frustrated magnetism, and we prove convergence of this hierarchy in the thermodynamic limit. Our method subsumes the Luttinger--Tisza method and further applies to non-quadratic Hamiltonians and non-Bravais lattices, thus addressing limitations of prior analytical methods. We apply the method to various two-dimensional frustrated spin models, where it brackets the energy densities and observables accurately across large parameter ranges with typical run times of seconds per parameter point.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于半定规划的方法，能够为无限晶格上平移不变经典自旋模型的基态能量密度和关联函数提供严格的上下界。该方法将无限晶格上的非凸优化问题替换为一系列有限尺寸的凸优化问题，这些优化问题源于任何自旋构型概率分布必须满足的正性条件。该方法将多项式优化中的Lasserre层级结构适配到受挫磁性领域，并证明了该层级结构在热力学极限下的收敛性。该方法推广了Luttinger-Tisza方法，适用于非二次哈密顿量和非布拉维晶格。在二维受挫自旋模型上的实验表明，该方法能在较大参数范围内准确界定能量密度和可观测量，每个参数点典型运行时间为秒级。
AI.motivation: 受挫磁性系统中，由于几何阻挫导致传统解析方法（如Luttinger-Tisza）失效，而直接数值模拟面临无限晶格非凸优化的巨大挑战。现有方法在处理非二次哈密顿量和非布拉维晶格时存在局限性，亟需一种既能提供严格界又具备计算可行性的通用方法。
AI.method: 将Lasserre层级结构从多项式优化迁移至统计力学：利用平移不变性将问题转化为矩问题，通过半定规划施加概率分布的正性条件（矩矩阵正定），构建一系列凸松弛来逼近原非凸问题，并证明在层级深度趋于无穷时收敛到真值。
AI.result: 在多种二维受挫自旋模型上验证了方法的有效性：能在数秒内给出基态能量密度和关联函数的严格上下界，且界宽随层级增加快速收紧；成功处理了非二次相互作用（如环交换项）和非布拉维晶格（如kagome晶格）等Luttinger-Tisza方法无法覆盖的情形。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为受挫磁性的严格计算提供了强大工具，兼具理论严谨性（收敛性保证）和计算实用性（秒级运行时间）。未来可扩展至更高维度、非零温系统和量子模型，为受挫系统的相图研究开辟新路径。

title: Beyond the conventional Emery model: crucial role of long-range hopping for cuprate superconductivity
summary: The Emery model is the quintessential model for cuprate superconductors. In his eponymous paper, Emery only considered the next-nearest-neighbor oxygen-copper hopping. Later, also the relevance of nearest- and next-nearest oxygen-oxygen hoppings has been pointed out. Using dynamical vertex approximation, we find a superconducting dome consistent with cuprates. However, long-range hoppings beyond the three conventional hopping parameters are necessary for the quantitatively correct phase diagram and for a proper d-wave order parameter.

AI.tldr: 本文利用动力学顶点近似（DΓA）研究了Emery模型中的铜氧化物超导电性，发现常规的三个跳跃参数不足以准确描述相图和d波序参量，需要引入更长程的跳跃项。
AI.motivation: 传统的Emery模型仅考虑次近邻氧-铜跳跃，后来研究者指出氧-氧跳跃也很重要。本文旨在探究这些长程跳跃对铜氧化物超导相图和d波序参量的定量影响。
AI.method: 采用动力学顶点近似（Dynamical Vertex Approximation, DΓA）方法对Emery模型进行数值计算。
AI.result: 发现超导拱形（dome）与铜氧化物实验结果一致，但仅靠三个传统跳跃参数无法得到定量正确的相图和d波序参量，必须引入更长程的跳跃项。
AI.conclusion: 更长程跳跃对铜氧化物超导的定量描述至关重要，是获得准确相图和d波序参量的必要条件。

title: Hybrid-order topology in two-dimensional nonsymmorphic antiferromagnets
comment: 5 pages, 4 figures, submitted to Phys. Rev. B
summary: We theoretically demonstrate hybrid-order topology in a two-dimensional nonsymmorphic antiferromagnet. Utilizing a generic antiferromagnetic Dirac model with a symmetry-allowed, momentum-dependent spin-density-wave (SDW) mass, we show that a single bulk insulating phase exhibits distinct topological boundary manifestations governed solely by the termination geometry. For screw-compatible edges, nonsymmorphic screw symmetry protects gapless first-order edge states. In contrast, for a $45^\circ$ diamond-shaped termination, the screw symmetry is broken at the boundary, resulting in gapped edges. However, the finite geometry still preserves magnetic mirror symmetries $\mathcal{M}_x\mathcal{T}$ and $\mathcal{M}_y\mathcal{T}$, which enforce an alternating pattern of edge masses, thereby binding zero-dimensional corner states. This second-order phase is characterized by a quantized quadrupole moment, with corner states pinned to zero energy by the chiral symmetry. We further demonstrate that explicit lattice perturbations can selectively gap the first-order edge modes while robustly preserving the corner states. Our work establishes a symmetry-based route to a termination-controlled duality between first- and second-order topology in magnetic nonsymmorphic systems.

AI.tldr: 本文从理论上证明，在二维非对称反铁磁体中，仅通过改变边界几何结构，即可在同一体绝缘相中实现一阶拓扑边缘态和二阶拓扑角态之间的可控转变。
AI.motivation: 探索非对称磁性体系中拓扑相与边界终止几何之间的内在联系，建立一种无需改变体材料性质即可切换拓扑阶数的对称性调控机制。
AI.method: 基于通用的反铁磁Dirac模型，引入对称性允许的动量依赖自旋密度波质量项，分别分析螺旋兼容边界（保持螺旋对称性）和45°菱形边界（打破螺旋对称性但保留磁镜对称性）下的拓扑边界态行为。
AI.result: 螺旋兼容边界呈现无能隙一阶边缘态；45°菱形边界虽边缘有能隙，但磁镜对称性迫使边缘质量交替排列，束缚零维角态，该二阶相具有量子化的四极矩，且角态受手征对称性保护锁定在零能。
AI.conclusion: 建立了磁性非对称体系中首个由边界终止控制的一阶与二阶拓扑对偶性，且晶格微扰可选择性地打开一阶边缘态能隙而鲁棒地保留角态。

title: Anomalous Phase-Coherence Scaling in a Quantum-Critical Dirac Semimetal
summary: We have investigated the weak antilocalization (WAL) in the pressurized Dirac semimetal $α$-(BEDT-TTF)$_2$I$_3$ across a correlation-driven quantum phase transition to a charge-ordered insulating state and evaluated the phase coherence length $L_φ$ and its temperature scaling under various pressures from the low-temperature magnetoconductivity. In the high-pressure regime, the system exhibits the conventional two-dimensional dephasing behavior ($L_φ \propto T^{-p}$ with $p \approx 1/2$), characteristic of electron-electron scattering in diffusive conductors. As the pressure approaches the critical pressure ($P_c \sim 1.2$ GPa), the temperature exponent is suppressed to $p \sim 0.3$, while $L_φ$ remains large ($700\text{-}800$ nm at 0.5 K). This anomalous scaling suggests nontrivial inelastic scattering associated with Dirac electrons near the quantum critical point. The persistence of WAL across the transition supports a gapless or nearly gapless quantum phase transition.

AI.tldr: 研究压力调控下狄拉克半金属α-(BEDT-TTF)₂I₃中的弱反局域化效应，发现接近量子临界点时相位相干长度的温度指数出现异常变化（p≈0.3），表明存在与狄拉克电子相关的非平凡非弹性散射机制。
AI.motivation: 探究关联驱动量子相变（从狄拉克半金属到电荷有序绝缘体）过程中，弱反局域化行为如何变化，特别是相位相干长度及其温度标度律在临界点附近的演化规律。
AI.method: 在不同压力条件下测量低温磁导率，分析弱反局域化效应，提取相位相干长度L_φ及其温度标度指数p，系统研究从高压区到临界压力P_c≈1.2 GPa附近的输运行为变化。
AI.result: 高压区呈现常规二维退相干行为（L_φ∝T^{-p}, p≈1/2），符合扩散导体中电子-电子散射特征；接近P_c时温度指数被抑制至p≈0.3，但L_φ仍保持较大（0.5 K下700-800 nm）。
AI.conclusion: 临界点附近异常的温度标度律揭示了狄拉克电子在量子临界点附近的非平凡非弹性散射；弱反局域化效应在相变两侧持续存在，支持该相变为无能隙或近无能隙的量子相变。

title: Multilane Asymmetric Exclusion Process with stationary Bernoulli measure
summary: We consider an Asymmetric Exclusion Process evolving on parallel mutually interacting lanes with neighbouring nearest hoppings of hardcore particles. Number of particles on each lane is conserved. We find a choice of the hopping rates, for which the process has Bernouilli stationary product measure, and calculate the stationary particle currents as a function of average particle densities.

AI.tldr: 本文研究平行相互作用车道上的不对称排斥过程，发现特定跳转速率下系统具有伯努利平稳乘积测度，并计算了作为平均粒子密度函数的平稳粒子流。
AI.motivation: 研究多车道相互作用系统中粒子跳转的稳态特性，寻找具有可解平稳测度的参数条件。
AI.method: 对平行相互作用车道上的不对称排斥过程建模，粒子最近邻跳转且每车道粒子数守恒，通过分析跳转速率选择来寻找伯努利平稳乘积测度。
AI.result: 找到了特定跳转速率使系统具有伯努利平稳乘积测度，并推导出平稳粒子流与平均粒子密度的函数关系。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为多车道相互作用系统的稳态分析提供了可解析求解的特例，有助于理解复杂粒子输运系统的平衡性质。

title: Revisiting Ferroelectricity Beyond Polar Space Groups
summary: Ferroelectricity, a hallmark of spontaneous inversion-symmetry breaking, has been a central concept in condensed matter physics and functional materials research, yet recent discoveries are revealing that switchable polarization can emerge in forms far richer than allowed by the conventional symmetry-based paradigm. Fractional quantum ferroelectricity and ionic-conductor ferroelectricity challenge the long-standing association of ferroelectricity exclusively with polar space groups. In this Review, we reconcile these emerging phenomena within the Berry-phase modern theory of polarization. We emphasize that polarization in insulating periodic crystals is not a single-valued vector, but a multivalued lattice quantity defined modulo a polarization quantum. Consequently, nonpolar crystals may possess nonzero formal polarization, and adiabatic paths connecting symmetry-equivalent structures can produce quantized changes in polarization without violating symmetry principles. The symmetry of this multivalued formal polarization is governed by a generalized Neumann principle. We further show that the large polarization changes induced by long-range ion migration in both fractional quantum ferroelectrics and ionic-conductor ferroelectrics can be naturally understood through the topological definition of oxidation state, which links ionic transport to quantized charge transfer and polarization change. We discuss the physical accessibility of these unconventional polarization states, highlighting the roles of switching pathways, boundary conditions, and domain-wall dynamics, particularly in systems such as $α$-In$_2$Se$_3$. Finally, we suggest that the most promising functionality of these materials may lie not in conventional bulk ferroelectric switching, but in the creation and control of charged interfaces and domain walls arising from discontinuities in formal polarization.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了超越传统对称性范式的新型铁电现象（分数量子铁电体和离子导体铁电体），利用Berry相现代极化理论统一解释，指出极化是模极化量子定义的多值晶格量，非极性晶体也可具有非零形式极化，并通过氧化的拓扑定义将离子迁移与量化电荷转移和极化变化联系起来。
AI.motivation: 传统铁电范式将铁电性与极性空间群紧密关联，但新兴的分数量子铁电和离子导体铁电现象挑战了这一认知，亟需一个统一的理论框架来调和这些看似矛盾的现象。
AI.method: 运用Berry相现代极化理论，提出极化的多值性和模极化量子定义；引入广义纽曼原理描述形式极化的对称性；通过氧化的拓扑定义将离子迁移与量化电荷转移和极化变化联系起来。
AI.result: 非极性晶体可具有非零形式极化；对称等效结构间的绝热路径可产生量化极化变化；离子长程迁移导致的巨大极化变化可通过氧化态的拓扑定义自然理解。
AI.conclusion: 这些非常规铁电材料最有前景的功能不在于传统的体块铁电翻转，而在于由形式极化不连续性产生的带电界面和畴壁的创建与控制。

title: Probabilistic denoising for reliable signal extraction in spectroscopy
summary: While deep learning offers powerful capabilities for scientific research, its application is often hindered by a lack of quantitative reliability. To address this, we introduce a probabilistic denoising framework that simultaneously extracts denoised signals and element-wise predictive uncertainties from noisy data. We demonstrate this approach on three-dimensional angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy data, showing that the model reliably recovers the spectral features of a cuprate superconductor from Poisson-distributed noise with an average count of only 0.02 electrons per voxel. Crucially, we show that these predicted uncertainties can be propagated into subsequent superconducting gap analyses, enabling quantitative parameter extraction with scientifically meaningful error bars. Furthermore, we validate the broad applicability of our approach by successfully extending it to two-dimensional X-ray diffraction data. Ultimately, this approach establishes uncertainty-aware deep learning not merely as a visualization tool, but as a rigorous framework for scientific data analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种概率去噪框架，可同时从噪声数据中提取去噪信号和逐元素预测不确定性，并在ARPES和XRD数据上验证了其可靠性，实现了具有科学意义误差线的定量分析。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在科学研究中功能强大，但缺乏定量可靠性，阻碍了其应用。现有方法无法提供可传播的不确定性估计，导致无法进行有科学意义的定量分析。
AI.method: 提出一个概率去噪框架，在从噪声数据中恢复信号的同时，逐元素输出预测不确定性。使用泊松噪声模型，在三维ARPES和二维XRD数据上训练和测试。
AI.result: 在平均每体素仅0.02个电子的极低计数下，模型仍能可靠恢复铜氧化物超导体的谱特征。预测的不确定性可成功传播到后续超导能隙分析中，产生具有科学意义的误差棒。
AI.conclusion: 该方法将不确定性感知的深度学习从可视化工具提升为严格的科学研究分析框架，具有广泛适用性。

title: Topological Characterization of Discrete-Time Classical Stochastic Processes: Dual Role of Point-Gap Topology
summary: We present topological characterization of classical stochastic processes described by discrete-time Markov chains on lattices. We point out that point-gap topology of stochastic matrices entails two distinct physical consequences that hinge on the choice of the reference point. The point-gap topology around a generic reference point is related to the direction of transport, and nontrivial topology around the origin of the complex spectrum of a stochastic matrix implies non-Markovianity caused by, e.g., feedback control. On the basis of this characterization, we identify the topological origin of directed transport in a classic experiment of Maxwell's demon [S. Toyabe et al., Nat. Phys. 6, 988 (2010)] and find the topological nature of feedback control beyond thermodynamic interpretation. We demonstrate that a topologically enforced non-Markovian classical stochastic process can be simulated by a Markovian quantum master equation, indicating a topological form of quantum advantage.

AI.tldr: 本文对经典随机过程（离散时间马尔可夫链）进行了拓扑刻画，发现随机矩阵的点隙拓扑与传输方向及非马尔可夫性相关，并揭示了麦克斯韦妖实验中的拓扑起源以及反馈控制的拓扑本质，同时展示了拓扑非马尔可夫过程可由量子马尔可夫主方程模拟，体现了一种拓扑形式的量子优势。
AI.motivation: 作者试图为经典随机过程建立拓扑刻画框架，并探索其物理后果，特别是解释麦克斯韦妖实验中定向输运的拓扑起源，以及寻找经典非马尔可夫过程与量子过程之间的拓扑联系。
AI.method: 利用点隙拓扑（point-gap topology）分析随机矩阵的复谱结构，区分参考点选择带来的两种不同拓扑后果：围绕一般参考点的拓扑对应于输运方向，而围绕原点的拓扑则与非马尔可夫性（如反馈控制）相关。进一步结合实验（Toyabe等人的麦克斯韦妖实验）和量子主方程模拟进行验证。
AI.result: 1) 点隙拓扑与输运方向直接相关；2) 原点周围的非平凡拓扑对应非马尔可夫性；3) 揭示了麦克斯韦妖实验中定向输运的拓扑起源；4) 发现反馈控制的拓扑本质超越了热力学解释；5) 拓扑非马尔可夫经典过程可由马尔可夫量子主方程模拟，展现了量子优势。
AI.conclusion: 拓扑视角为理解经典随机过程（特别是非马尔可夫性和输运）提供了新框架，并建立了经典与量子过程之间的拓扑桥梁，暗示了量子模拟在经典随机过程中的潜在优势。

title: Revisiting magnetoelectric response in collinear antiferromagnetic zigzag chains: A downfolding approach beyond conventional low-energy models
summary: Magnetoelectric (ME) effects in antiferromagnets provide a fertile platform for exploring symmetry-driven cross-correlated responses. However, their microscopic origin remains elusive and is often obscured in simplified low-energy descriptions. In this study, we revisit the microscopic mechanism of the ME effect in a collinear antiferromagnetic zigzag chain by employing a multi-orbital tight-binding model that explicitly includes both $s$- and $p$-orbital degrees of freedom. Using analytical and numerical calculations based on the Kubo formula, we demonstrate that the ME response is governed by orbital degrees of freedom activated through $s$--$p$ hybridization, while the spin contribution vanishes due to spin conservation. To elucidate the low-energy description, we derive an effective Hamiltonian projected onto the $s$-orbital subspace using the Schur complement. We show that a naive application of the Kubo formula within this effective model fails to capture the ME response. This issue is resolved by systematically incorporating vertex corrections in terms of orbital hybridization into the response functions. Furthermore, by introducing a quasiparticle renormalization scheme, we formulate a renormalized Kubo formula that preserves conservation laws and accurately reproduces the full multi-orbital results. Our analysis revisits the conventional low-energy perspective and reveals that the ME effect originates from virtual interorbital processes encoded in vertex corrections, rather than from the bare low-energy Hamiltonian. The effective framework developed here provides a unified microscopic understanding of orbital-driven ME responses and offers a systematic route to incorporate hybridization effects beyond simple low-energy models.

AI.tldr: 本文通过多轨道紧束缚模型研究共线反铁磁锯齿链中的磁电效应，发现ME响应由s-p杂化激活的轨道自由度主导，自旋贡献因自旋守恒而消失。通过Schur互补推导低能有效哈密顿量，揭示仅用Kubo公式无法捕捉ME响应，需引入顶点修正。提出重整化Kubo公式，证明ME效应源于虚拟轨道间过程（顶点修正），而非裸低能哈密顿量。
AI.motivation: 反铁磁体中的磁电效应机制尚不明确，低能简化描述常掩盖其微观起源。本文旨在通过显式包含s、p轨道自由度的多轨道模型，揭示ME效应的微观机制，并建立能正确描述低能行为的理论框架。
AI.method: 采用包含s和p轨道的多轨道紧束缚模型，基于Kubo公式进行解析和数值计算；利用Schur互补将有效哈密顿量投影到s轨道子空间；系统引入顶点修正（轨道杂化）到响应函数；提出准粒子重整化方案，构建保持守恒律的重整化Kubo公式。
AI.result: ME响应由s-p杂化激活的轨道自由度主导，自旋贡献为零。低能有效模型中直接应用Kubo公式失效，必须通过顶点修正纳入轨道杂化。重整化Kubo公式能准确再现全多轨道结果，证明ME效应源自虚拟轨道间过程（编码在顶点修正中），而非裸低能哈密顿量。
AI.conclusion: 本文建立了轨道驱动ME响应的统一微观理解，提供了超越简单低能模型、系统纳入杂化效应的有效框架，修正了传统低能视角对ME效应起源的认知。

title: Nonreciprocal McKean-Vlasov Equations: From Stationary Instabilities to Travelling Waves
summary: Nonreciprocal interactions, in which action-reaction symmetry is broken, provide a powerful route to collective dynamics that cannot be captured by equilibrium free-energy minimisation. Here, we introduce and analyse a two-species nonreciprocal McKean-Vlasov equation derived from an underlying system of interacting stochastic particles. Combining linear stability analysis, weakly nonlinear arguments, pseudo-spectral simulations, and Langevin particle dynamics, we show that the structure of nonreciprocity controls the onset and nature of collective order. For spatially uniform weak nonreciprocity, asymmetry shifts the critical diffusion threshold but produces only stationary instabilities, indicating that uniform imbalance alone is insufficient to generate sustained time-dependent motion. In contrast, spatially modulated nonreciprocity fundamentally enriches the dynamics: depending on its symmetry and coupling to the interaction potential, the homogeneous state can lose stability through Hopf bifurcations, giving rise to standing and travelling wave states. We identify both subcritical and supercritical Hopf transitions, relate the selected patterns to Landau saturation coefficients, and show that travelling waves can emerge even in the weak-nonreciprocity regime without explicit microscopic run-and-chase rules. Direct Langevin simulations confirm that these oscillatory and travelling states persist at the particle level and are not artefacts of the continuum mean-field description. Our results establish nonreciprocal McKean-Vlasov equations as a minimal framework for understanding how spatially structured asymmetric interactions generate self-organized motion, dynamical phase transitions, and nonequilibrium collective order.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了非互易McKean-Vlasov方程，发现空间调制的非互易性（而非均匀非互易性）才能通过Hopf分岔产生行波和驻波等非平衡集体有序态，并验证了这些现象在微观粒子层面依然存在。
AI.motivation: 非互易相互作用（动作-反应对称性破缺）能产生平衡自由能最小化无法描述的集体动力学，但非互易性的结构（均匀vs空间调制）如何影响有序态的产生和性质尚不清楚。
AI.method: 从相互作用随机粒子系统推导出两物种非互易McKean-Vlasov方程，综合运用线性稳定性分析、弱非线性理论、伪谱模拟和Langevin粒子动力学进行系统分析。
AI.result: 均匀弱非互易只能产生静止不稳定性；空间调制非互易性可通过Hopf分岔产生驻波和行波，存在亚临界和超临界Hopf转变，弱非互易区域无需微观追逐规则即可出现行波。
AI.conclusion: 非互易McKean-Vlasov方程是理解空间结构不对称相互作用如何产生自组织运动、动力学相变和非平衡集体有序态的极简框架。

title: Spin-lattice coupling enables adaptive adsorption in magnetically-driven electrocatalysts
summary: A major challenge in electrochemistry is to decouple the reactive intermediates of a catalytic cycle to optimise their energies independently. During the oxygen evolution reaction (OER), such energy interdependence results from the need to generate multiple adsorbates at the same site and sets the minimum overpotential. Here, we show that an external stimulus, such as a magnetic field, can relax the scaling relationships between intermediates during the OER. Spectroscopic measurements and Density Functional Theory simulations in Ni-Fe oxyhydroxides reveal that applying a magnetic field alters surface chemisorption and injects structural flexibility at the interface. We interpret these observations as a consequence of stimulated changes in the spin-lattice coupling, which allow access to quasi-degenerate oxygenated intermediates that modulate the reaction energy demands. Our findings redefine the scaling limitations as state-projected rather than intrinsic and establish external stimulation as a strategy to navigate multi-state energy landscapes in electrocatalysis and sensing applications.

AI.tldr: 本研究展示磁场能够松弛Ni-Fe羟基氧化物在析氧反应(OER)中的中间体标度关系，通过自旋-晶格耦合改变表面化学吸附和结构柔性，从而突破传统热力学能垒限制。
AI.motivation: 电催化中反应中间体之间的能量标度关系（scaling relationships）导致过电位下限，传统方法难以独立优化各中间体的能量，亟需新策略突破这一限制。
AI.method: 结合光谱测量和密度泛函理论(DFT)模拟，在Ni-Fe羟基氧化物体系中施加磁场，研究其对OER中间体吸附能及反应路径的影响。
AI.result: 磁场改变了表面化学吸附并注入界面结构柔性，通过刺激自旋-晶格耦合变化，使准简并的含氧中间体得以被访问，从而调节反应能量需求，松弛了标度关系。
AI.conclusion: 标度限制本质上是状态投影（state-projected）而非固有性质，外部刺激（如磁场）可作为导航多态能量景观的策略，应用于电催化和传感领域。

title: Effective Gilbert damping in the stochastic Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert equation
summary: Quasi particle based (e.g. Boltzmann equation) studies of spin wave transport often assume that their scattering rates follow the simple form $η=αω$, with the Gilbert damping $α$ and frequency $ω$. In this work, we examine the effective damping $α_{eff,T}=η/ω$ observed in atomistic spin dynamics, when temperature and spin wave interactions are introduced for a 1D spin chain. We extract the dynamical correlation functions from spin trajectories propagated using the stochastic Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert equation, and fit the dynamical structure factor, yielding the dispersion and scattering rates for a wide range of temperatures. The resulting effective damping can be very different from the initially constant Gilbert value. It exhibits a temperature and crystal momentum scaling which we explain based on interactions with the Gilbert bath and spin wave scattering by changes in local magnetic order.

AI.tldr: 本文通过原子尺度自旋动力学模拟，研究了1D自旋链中温度和自旋波相互作用对有效阻尼的影响，发现其偏离了传统吉尔伯特阻尼假设，并呈现出温度和晶体动量依赖的标度行为。
AI.motivation: 准粒子（如玻尔兹曼方程）研究自旋波输运时通常假设散射率服从简单形式 η=αω，但该假设在引入温度和相互作用后是否成立尚不明确。
AI.method: 采用随机Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert方程模拟一维自旋链，从自旋轨迹中提取动力学关联函数，拟合动力学结构因子，从而获得不同温度下的色散关系和散射率。
AI.result: 有效阻尼 α_eff,T = η/ω 与初始常数吉尔伯特阻尼显著不同，表现出温度和晶体动量的标度依赖。
AI.conclusion: 这种偏差源于与吉尔伯特热库的相互作用以及局部磁序涨落引起的自旋波散射。

title: Frustration of harmonic and solitonic helimagnetism on the body-centered tetragonal lattice of GdAlSi
summary: The triangular lattice antiferromagnet (TLAF) with nearest-neighbor exchange interaction is a model platform in the field of frustrated magnetism. Here, anharmonic ('up-up-down') and harmonic magnetic states compete, because a helimagnetic wave and its higher harmonic are degenerate in energy. We show that a body-centered tetragonal lattice (BCTL) can realize a similar frustration of harmonic and anharmonic helimagnetic states, and that the tetragonal magnetic Weyl semimetal GdAlSi realizes this scenario. In an applied magnetic field, resonant elastic X-ray scattering reveals a competition of harmonic cycloidal and solitonic double-Q states, well consistent with mean-field calculations. Our work provides a new paradigm for frustration physics in BCTL materials.

AI.tldr: 本文发现体心四方晶格（BCTL）也能实现类似三角晶格反铁磁体中的谐波与非谐波螺旋磁态的竞争，并在磁性Weyl半金属GdAlSi中通过共振X射线散射实验验证了这种竞争，为BCTL材料中的阻挫物理提供了新范式。
AI.motivation: 三角晶格反铁磁体（TLAF）中谐波与非谐波磁态竞争是阻挫物理的重要平台，但这类现象局限于三角晶格。寻找其他晶格中类似的阻挫机制，扩展阻挫物理的研究范围。
AI.method: 理论分析指出BCTL可实现谐波与非谐波螺旋磁态的竞争；通过共振弹性X射线散射实验，在外加磁场下观测GdAlSi中谐波摆线态与孤子双Q态的竞争；结合平均场计算进行验证。
AI.result: 实验观测到GdAlSi中谐波摆线态与孤子双Q态之间的竞争，与平均场计算结果高度一致。
AI.conclusion: BCTL为阻挫物理提供了新平台，拓展了人们对谐波与非谐波磁态竞争现象的理解。

title: Hydrodynamics and boundary-induced phase transitions in the $n$-species particle-exchange process
summary: The $n$-species particle-exchange process (PEP($n$)) is an exclusion process in which particles of $n$ different species exchange positions on neighbouring sites with rates chosen such that the invariant measure on the discrete torus is a product measure. We address the large-scale hydrodynamic behaviour of this process which yields a system of $n$ coupled inviscid Burgers equations. This system of conservation laws is shown to admit Riemann invariants for arbitrary $n$ from which explicit solutions of the Riemann problem in terms of shock waves and rarefaction fans are obtained. We also introduce the open PEP($n$), in which particles are exchanged with boundary reservoirs. For a distinguished manifold of boundary rates, we prove that the invariant measure is the same product measure as in the periodic system. The hydrodynamic description in terms of Riemann invariants is used to derive the stationary phase diagram explicitly in terms of microscopic boundary rates. In the generic case, the steady state exhibits $2n+1$ phases, with boundary-induced phase transitions analogous to those of the single-species asymmetric simple exclusion process.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了n物种粒子交换过程（PEP(n)）的流体动力学行为，推导出耦合的inviscid Burgers方程组，发现了任意n的黎曼不变量，并给出了黎曼问题的显式解（冲击波和稀疏波）。同时引入开放边界版本，证明了一类特殊边界速率下不变测度与周期系统相同，并利用黎曼不变量推导出相图，得到2n+1个相和边界诱导相变。
AI.motivation: 探索多物种排斥过程的宏观流体动力学行为，以及开放边界下的稳态相结构。
AI.method: 通过流体动力学极限推导耦合Burgers方程，利用黎曼不变量求解黎曼问题；引入开放边界版本，分析边界速率对不变测度的影响，并推导相图。
AI.result: 得到了任意n的黎曼不变量和黎曼问题的显式解；证明了特定边界速率下不变测度与周期系统一致；稳态相图包含2n+1个相，存在边界诱导相变。
AI.conclusion: 多物种排斥过程的宏观行为由耦合Burgers方程描述，黎曼不变量是求解关键；开放边界下的相结构与单物种ASEP类似但更丰富。

title: Dislocations in (011)-oriented vertical Bridgman $β$-Ga$_2$O$_3$ substrates
summary: Dislocation in (011)-oriented $β$-Ga$_2$O$_3$ substrates grown by the vertical Bridgman method was investigated using X-ray topography (XRT), combined with X-ray reticulography. Transmission XRT reveals dislocations lying on the (001) plane and extending along [010], forming arrays associated with domain boundaries. Dislocations on the (011) plane were also identified but differ from those responsible for line-shaped pits on (001) epilayers. Reflection XRT shows good agreement with transmission XRT and enables classification of dislocation types based on contrast features. Reticulography confirms domain boundaries with misorientation on the order of 1E-5 rad, providing insight into defect formation relevant to epi-growth and device performance.

AI.tldr: 本文利用X射线形貌术(XRT)和X射线网格照相术研究了垂直布里奇曼法生长的(011)取向β-Ga₂O₃衬底中的位错，发现(001)面上沿[010]方向延伸的位错阵列与畴界相关，并通过网格照相术确认了约10⁻⁵弧度级别的畴界取向差，为外延生长和器件性能提供了缺陷形成机理的见解。
AI.motivation: β-Ga₂O₃作为宽禁带半导体材料在功率器件中有重要应用前景，但衬底中的位错等缺陷严重影响外延层质量和器件性能。目前对(011)取向衬底中位错类型的系统研究尚不充分，需要深入理解其类型、分布及形成机制。
