AI.method: 采用透射X射线形貌术(TXRT)和反射X射线形貌术(RXRT)相结合的方法，同时辅以X射线网格照相术(reticulography)，对(011)取向β-Ga₂O₃衬底中的位错进行表征和分类。
AI.result: (1)透射XRT揭示了位于(001)面且沿[010]方向延伸的位错，这些位错形成与畴界相关的阵列；(2)识别了(011)面上的位错，但其与(001)外延层上观察到的线状蚀坑对应的位错类型不同；(3)反射XRT与透射XRT结果吻合良好，并可根据衬度特征对位错类型进行分类；(4)网格照相术证实存在取向差约10⁻⁵弧度的畴界。
AI.conclusion: 综合多种X射线表征手段，系统揭示了(011)取向β-Ga₂O₃衬底中位错的类型、分布和畴界特征，为优化衬底生长工艺、减少缺陷密度、改善外延质量和提升器件性能提供了重要的实验依据。

title: Point-gap topology of damped magnon excitations in skyrmion strings
summary: We theoretically study the non-Hermitian topology of magnons with finite lifetimes due to Gilbert damping. By incorporating the spin-wave theory and perturbation theory for the Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert equation including nonlocal damping terms, we analytically evaluate the spectral winding number for point gaps, which indicates the existence of the non-Hermitian skin effect (NHSE). We find that the NHSE can occur even in the absence of nonlocal damping. In the presence of nonlocal damping along one direction, we show that the winding number for an energy band with a unique minimum is determined from the sign of the wave number at the band minimum. We demonstrate these results using a model that hosts a skyrmion-string lattice as a steady state. We further investigate spin-wave propagation dynamics excited by a magnetic-field pulse and show that the propagation direction changes drastically from band to band depending on the presence of local and nonlocal damping, consistent with the nontrivial winding numbers.

AI.tldr: 本文从理论上研究了有限寿命磁振子的非厄米拓扑性质，发现即使没有非局域阻尼，非厄米趋肤效应（NHSE）也能出现，并通过磁场脉冲激发的自旋波传播动力学进行了验证。
AI.motivation: 研究吉尔伯特阻尼导致有限寿命磁振子的非厄米拓扑性质，探索非局域阻尼对非厄米趋肤效应的影响。
AI.method: 结合自旋波理论和Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert方程的微扰理论，解析计算点能隙的谱缠绕数，并通过磁场脉冲激发的自旋波传播动力学进行验证。
AI.result: 发现NHSE可在没有非局域阻尼时发生；非局域阻尼存在时，具有唯一极小值的能带缠绕数由带极小值处波数的符号决定；拓扑缠绕数与自旋波传播方向一致。
AI.conclusion: 磁振子系统中的非厄米拓扑行为可由局域和非局域阻尼调控，为自旋波传播控制提供新机制。

title: Tamed Feynman-Kac diffusion processes: Killing-branching intertwine
summary: Relaxation to equilibrium of a drifted Brownian motion is quantified by a probability density function, whose main (multiplicative) entry is an inferred Feynman-Kac kernel of the Schrödinger semigroup operator. Although seemingly devoid of a natural probabilistic significance (except for its explicit path integral definition), the pertinent kernel relaxes to equilibrium as well. The implicit Feynman-Kac potential ${\cal{V}}(x)$, continuous, confining and bounded from below, may take negative values. If positive, ${\cal{V}}(x)$ can be interpreted as the killing rate of the decaying diffusion process. In case of relaxing F-K kernels the killing effects are tamed (often overcompensated). The taming inavoidably appears in conjunction with the existence of the negativity subdomains of ${\cal{V}}(x)$ in $R$. If locally ${\cal{V}}(x) < 0$, its sign inversion $- {\cal{V}}(x)$ can be interpreted as the branching (cloning, alternatively bifurcation) rate in the course of the other wise free random motion. The arising killed diffusion processes with branching, we interpret as the possible path-wise background of tamed (relaxing) Feynman-Kac diffusions. We present acomputer-assisted path-wise arguments, towards a consistency of the killing/branching taming scenario, for a number of nonlinear model systems in one space dimension. Special attention is paid to Feynman-Kac potential shapes, presumed to be in the double well form, where an analytic access to eigenvalues and eigenfunctions is scarce beyond the semiclassical regime.

AI.tldr: 本文研究漂移布朗运动的平衡弛豫，通过Feynman-Kac核量化概率密度。该核可解释为带有杀死/分支过程的扩散，用于驯服负势能区域的效应，并通过一维非线性模型进行数值验证，重点关注双阱势情形。
AI.motivation: Feynman-Kac核虽在薛定谔半群算符中有明确定义，但缺乏自然的概率解释。作者试图为弛豫中的Feynman-Kac扩散赋予路径层面的概率意义，通过杀死（killing）和分支（branching）过程来解释势能取负值时的行为。
AI.method: 将正势能解释为杀死率，负势能反转符号后解释为分支率，构造杀死-分支扩散过程作为驯服Feynman-Kac扩散的路径背景；通过计算机辅助路径论证，在一维空间中对多个非线性模型系统进行一致性验证。
AI.result: 对于多种一维非线性模型，杀死/分支驯服场景在路径层面具有一致性；在双阱势情形下，该方法在经典半经典近似之外提供了分析特征值和特征函数的途径。
AI.conclusion: 杀死/分支扩散过程可作为Feynman-Kac弛豫扩散的合理概率解释路径，尤其适用于势能存在负值区域的情形。

title: Harnessing Structural Disorder: Unraveling Hydrogen Evolution in Monolayer Amorphous Carbon via First-Principles Simulations and Machine-Learned Potentials
summary: Disorder and defective coordination in the catalytic plane are crucial for enhancing the Hydrogen Evolution Reaction (HER) on two-dimensional catalysts. Amorphous materials are disordered, making them catalytically adaptive for many reactions. In this work, the HER capabilities of Monolayer Amorphous Carbon (MAC) were studied in comparison with crystalline carbon derivatives, such as pristine graphene (GE) and graphyne derivatives. MAC generated from melt-quench simulations revealed a diverse framework of predominantly sp2 and sp3 carbons with numerous 5-, 6-, and 7-membered rings. Density Functional Theory (DFT) calculations investigated free-energy variations in hydrogen adsorption for each material. According to Sabatier's principle, optimum activity is achieved when the Gibbs free energy (Delta GH) change approaches zero. Crystalline carbon materials possess limited active sites, with beta-graphyne showing the best Delta GH value of +0.34 eV. The adsorption study for MAC was conducted in 30 distinct local environments, where core structural properties were analyzed against varying radii. Calculations showed a Delta GH distribution for MAC ranging from -0.02 eV to +1.35 eV. To evaluate activity across the entire MAC surface, a MACE MLIP foundation model was finetuned, achieving optimal energy and force fitting of 1.67 meV/atom and 29.15 meV/A, respectively. The MLIP predicted Delta GH values from -0.91 eV to +1.70 eV, with approximately 15% of sites exhibiting values below +0.25 eV. Feature analysis revealed that 7-membered rings, curvature, and ripple height enhance HER activity. Our findings suggest that, with careful optimization of local features, MAC can be tuned to compete with noble metal catalysts.

AI.tldr: 本文通过密度泛函理论和机器学习力场研究了单层非晶碳（MAC）的析氢反应催化性能，发现其比晶体碳材料具有更多活性位点，其中约15%的位点表现出接近最优的吉布斯自由能（<0.25 eV），且七元环、曲率和波纹高度是增强活性的关键因素，表明MAC有望通过优化与贵金属催化剂竞争。
AI.motivation: 探索无序非晶结构（单层非晶碳MAC）在二维催化剂中提升析氢反应（HER）性能的潜力，以弥补晶体碳材料（如石墨烯、石墨炔）活性位点有限的不足。
AI.method: 使用熔融淬火模拟生成MAC，通过DFT计算不同局部环境的氢吸附吉布斯自由能（ΔG_H），并微调MACE机器学习力场（MLIP）预测全表面活性，结合特征分析（环结构、曲率、波纹高度）探究活性增强机制。
AI.result: 晶体碳中β-石墨炔ΔG_H最佳为+0.34 eV；MAC的DFT计算ΔG_H范围为-0.02至+1.35 eV，MLIP预测范围为-0.91至+1.70 eV，约15%位点ΔG_H<0.25 eV。七元环、曲率和波纹高度显著提升HER活性。
AI.conclusion: 通过优化局部特征（如环结构和曲率），MAC可调谐至接近贵金属催化剂的HER活性水平，为非晶碳材料在催化领域的应用提供了新方向。

title: Exciton-mediated optical control of liquid-solid friction
summary: Interfacial friction in nanofluidic systems can arise from fluctuation-induced coupling between liquid charge fluctuations and the internal excitations of the confining solid. Here, we develop a microscopic theory of exciton-mediated solid-liquid friction based on the coupling between optically generated excitons and charge fluctuations in water. We distinguish between static excitons, localized by disorder or functionalization, and dynamic excitons, which interact with water through polarization fluctuations. In both cases, we derive analytical formulas for the excitonic friction, which is experimentally tunable and can significantly reduce the slip length and thereby the hydraulic permeability of nanochannels. Applying our framework to carbon nanotubes, we quantitatively reproduce the recent measurements of Kistwal et al., showing a reduction of nanotube diffusion under optical excitation, without fitting parameters. More broadly, our results establish excitons as a mechanism to optically control nanofluidic transport and suggest that excitonic photoluminescence could provide an optical probe of flow velocity inside nanochannels.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了基于激子的固液界面摩擦微观理论，区分静态和动态激子，推导出激子摩擦的解析公式，并在碳纳米管中定量复现了光激发下扩散减小的实验测量结果，无需拟合参数。
AI.motivation: 纳米流体系统中界面摩擦可由液体电荷涨落与固体内部激发之间的耦合产生，作者希望从理论上理解激子介导的固液摩擦机制，并探索通过光学手段调控纳米流体输运的可能性。
AI.method: 基于光学产生的激子与水中的电荷涨落之间的耦合，建立激子介导固液摩擦的微观理论。区分了静态激子（由无序或功能化局域化）和动态激子（通过极化涨落与水相互作用），并推导出两种情况下激子摩擦的解析公式。
AI.result: 激子摩擦在实验上可调，能显著减小滑移长度，从而降低纳米通道的流体渗透性。在碳纳米管中，无需拟合参数即定量复现了Kistwal等人的实验测量，即光激发下纳米管扩散的减小。
AI.conclusion: 激子可作为光学控制纳米流体输运的机制，并且激子光致发光可能为纳米通道内流速提供光学探测手段。

title: Emergent Dynamic Magnetic Ground State in a Mixed 3d/5d Heavy Fermion System CaCu3Ir4O12
summary: Quantum-disordered magnetic ground states are challenging to identify in three-dimensional (3D) oxides, where strong exchange pathways typically favour long-range magnetic order or spin freezing. The quadruple perovskite $\mathrm{CaCu_3Ir_4O_{12}}$, crystallizing in the cubic $Im\bar{3}$ structure, provides a 3D lattice where $\mathrm{Cu^{2+}}$ $3d$ moments are coupled to an extended Ir $5d$ network, offering a rare platform for probing quantum-disordered magnetism in a mixed $3d/5d$ electron system. Here, we combine bulk probes, including DC and AC magnetic susceptibility, and heat capacity measurements (down to $50~\mathrm{mK}$), along with the local microscopic probe muon spin relaxation ($μ$SR) (down to $40~\mathrm{mK}$), to investigate the true magnetic ground state of $\mathrm{CaCu_3Ir_4O_{12}}$. Despite strong antiferromagnetic interactions ($θ_{\mathrm{W}} \sim -200~\mathrm{K}$, with an applied-field dependence), no signature of long-range magnetic ordering or spin freezing is detected down to the lowest measured temperatures. Furthermore, our in-depth zero-field (ZF) and longitudinal-field (LF) $μ$SR characterizations confirm strong quantum spin fluctuations and the truly dynamic nature of the local moments down to $40~\mathrm{mK}$. These results establish $\mathrm{CaCu_3Ir_4O_{12}}$ as a promising 3D quantum-disordered magnet and a well-characterized platform for exploring fluctuation-dominated states in correlated $3d/5d$ oxides.

AI.tldr: 本文通过宏观磁化率、比热和μ子自旋弛豫（μSR）等实验手段，研究了三维氧化物CaCu₃Ir₄O₁₂的磁基态。尽管存在强的反铁磁相互作用（θ_W ~ -200 K），但直到40 mK也未发现长程磁有序或自旋冻结，μSR证实了自旋的量子涨落和动态特性，表明该材料是一种三维量子无序磁体。
AI.motivation: 在三维氧化物中，量子无序磁基态难以识别，因为强交换作用通常会导致长程磁有序或自旋冻结。CaCu₃Ir₄O₁₂具有独特的立方结构，Cu²⁺的3d磁矩耦合到扩展的Ir 5d网络中，为探索混合3d/5d电子系统中的量子无序磁性提供了稀有平台。
AI.method: 结合宏观探针（直流/交流磁化率、比热，最低至50 mK）和局域微观探针（μSR，最低至40 mK），对CaCu₃Ir₄O₁₂的磁基态进行全面表征。
AI.result: 尽管存在强反铁磁相互作用（θ_W ~ -200 K，且随外加场变化），但在最低测量温度下未发现长程磁有序或自旋冻结的信号。零场和纵场μSR证实了强量子自旋涨落和局域磁矩的真正动态本质，直至40 mK。
AI.conclusion: CaCu₃Ir₄O₁₂是一种有前景的三维量子无序磁体，为探索关联3d/5d氧化物中的涨落主导态提供了一个良好表征的平台。

title: Cluster Dynamics Stay Fast-Until Tricriticality
summary: Cluster Monte Carlo algorithms are widely regarded as the most effective route to overcoming critical slowing down in lattice spin systems. Whether this acceleration persists in the presence of vacancies and multicritical fluctuations, however, remains unresolved. We address this question through a systematic dynamic-scaling study of hybrid cluster-local update schemes in the two-dimensional Blume-Capel model, which exhibits a line of continuous Ising-like transitions terminating at a tricritical point. Along the entire critical line, hybrid dynamics retain the near-optimal efficiency of pure cluster updates despite the presence of annealed vacancies. Strikingly, this acceleration collapses precisely at tricriticality, where the dynamic critical exponent reverts to the local-update value. We trace this breakdown to the correlated percolation of vacancies, whose emergent system-spanning geometry obstructs nonlocal relaxation in the spin sector. Our results identify a fundamental geometric limitation of cluster acceleration at tricriticality and establish vacancy percolation as the mechanism controlling dynamic universality in hybrid Monte Carlo dynamics.

AI.tldr: 本文通过研究二维Blume-Capel模型，发现团簇蒙特卡洛算法在临界线上能有效加速，但在三临界点处加速完全失效，动态临界指数退化为局部更新值。作者将这一失效归因于空位关联渗流产生的系统范围几何结构，阻碍了自旋部分的非局域弛豫。
AI.motivation: 团簇蒙特卡洛算法是克服临界慢化的最有效方法，但在存在空位和多临界涨落的情况下，这种加速是否仍然有效尚未明确。本文旨在解决这一悬而未决的问题。
AI.method: 对二维Blume-Capel模型进行系统的动态标度研究，采用混合团簇-局域更新方案，分析沿连续Ising型临界线及三临界点处的动态临界行为。
AI.result: 沿整个临界线，混合动力学保持了近乎最优的团簇更新效率；但在三临界点处，动态临界指数退化为局部更新值，团簇加速完全失效。
AI.conclusion: 团簇加速在三临界点处存在根本性的几何限制，空位渗流是控制混合蒙特卡洛动力学动态普适性的关键机制。

title: Epitaxial growth of beta-bismuthene on Sb2Te3
summary: Over the past decades, two-dimensional crystals have attracted considerable interest as promising materials for electronic and optoelectronic applications. Among them, graphene analogs composed of heavy atoms occupy a particularly distinctive niche due to their enhanced spin-orbit interaction. Here, we present an epitaxial heterointerface formed by beta-bismuthene on Sb2Te3, a well-known three-dimensional topological insulator. Using scanning tunneling microscopy, we systematically investigated the effects of Bi coverage and substrate temperature on nucleation processes, island morphology, and atomic structure. In addition, substrate-induced defects were identified throughout the bismuthene lattice.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在Sb2Te3拓扑绝缘体上外延生长β-铋烯的异质界面，利用扫描隧道显微镜分析了Bi覆盖度和衬底温度对成核过程、岛形态和原子结构的影响，并识别了衬底诱导的缺陷。
AI.motivation: 二维晶体（尤其是含重原子的类石墨烯材料）因其增强的自旋-轨道相互作用在电子和光电子应用中具有独特价值，但β-铋烯在拓扑绝缘体上的外延生长行为尚不清楚。
AI.method: 采用扫描隧道显微镜（STM），系统研究了不同Bi覆盖度和衬底温度对β-铋烯/Sb2Te3异质界面的成核过程、岛形态和原子结构的影响。
AI.result: 成功构建了β-铋烯与Sb2Te3的外延异质界面，观察到了衬底诱导的缺陷贯穿铋烯晶格，并明确了生长条件对形貌和结构的调控作用。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为含重原子的二维晶体在拓扑绝缘体上的异质外延生长提供了实验依据，对自旋电子学器件开发具有潜在意义。

title: Bias-Engineered Synthetic Antiferromagnets Hosting sub-20 nm Zero-Field Skyrmions at Room Temperature
summary: Synthetic antiferromagnetic skyrmions (SAFsk) are nanoscale, topologically protected spin textures with strong potential for spintronic technologies because of their high stability and the absence of the skyrmion Hall effect. However, robust zero field stabilization remains a central challenge. Here, a synthetic antiferromagnetic (SAF) bias system is introduced as a novel strategy to stabilize both ferromagnetic skyrmions (FMsk) and SAFsk at zero field. Ferromagnetic (FM) and SAF multilayers are designed, fabricated and integrated with the SAF bias system to enable controlled skyrmion stabilization and polarity setting via multilayer design and a preparatory field cycle. Combining quantitative and high-sensitivity magnetic force microscopy (MFM) with micromagnetic modeling, reliable zero field skyrmion formation is demonstrated and sub 20nm SAFsk are directly observed, the smallest SAFsk reported to date. Moreover, the SAF bias system concept introduced here offers a robust and scalable route to bias future skyrmion multilayers, as its compensated nature suppresses domain formation and preserves a uniform exchange field.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种合成反铁磁（SAF）偏置系统策略，成功实现了在零场下稳定铁磁和合成反铁磁斯格明子，并直接观测到亚20纳米尺寸的SAFsk，这是迄今报道的最小尺寸。
AI.motivation: 合成反铁磁斯格明子（SAFsk）具有高稳定性和无斯格明子霍尔效应的优势，但其在零场下的稳健稳定化是核心难题。
AI.method: 设计了铁磁（FM）和SAF多层膜，并将其与SAF偏置系统集成；通过多层膜设计和预置场循环实现可控的斯格明子稳定化与极性设置；结合定量高灵敏度磁力显微镜（MFM）与微磁模拟进行验证。
AI.result: 成功实现了可靠的零场斯格明子形成，并直接观测到亚20纳米的SAFsk，这是迄今报道的最小尺寸。SAF偏置系统因其补偿性质可抑制畴形成并保持均匀交换场。
AI.conclusion: 该SAF偏置系统概念为未来斯格明子多层膜提供了一种稳健且可扩展的偏置方案，具有重要的自旋电子学应用前景。

title: Ground states of quantum XY dipoles on the Archimedean lattices
summary: We report numerical ground states for the dipolar XY spin model, which describes extended antiferromagnetic interactions in two-dimensional arrays of polar molecules and two-level Rydberg atoms. Carrying out large-scale density matrix renormalization group (DMRG) calculations, we compute ground state properties on nine of the eleven Archimedean lattices--tilings of the plane by regular polygons. Four of these host trivial paramagnets, while another four develop collinear Neel magnetic order, as was found previously for the square lattice. For the ordered states, we calculate the hydrodynamic parameters (magnetization, susceptibility, and stiffness) and compare to linear spin wave theory. We also investigate the triangular lattice, for which we find several competing phases including coplanar magnetism, stripe density wave order, and a possible spin liquid; their relative stability is sensitive to the long-range couplings present in our dipolar model. Finally, the Archimedean classification is completed by the kagome lattice, which we argue in a companion work is likely to be a Dirac spin liquid.

AI.tldr: 本文利用DMRG方法计算了偶极XY自旋模型在11种阿基米德晶格中的9种上的基态性质，发现四种平庸顺磁相、四种共线奈尔磁有序相，并在三角晶格上发现了多种竞争相（共面磁性、条纹密度波和可能自旋液体），而kagome晶格可能是狄拉克自旋液体。
AI.motivation: 研究偶极XY自旋模型在不同阿基米德晶格上的基态性质，探究长程反铁磁相互作用下不同晶格几何对量子相的影响，特别是寻找可能存在的自旋液体相。
AI.method: 采用大规模密度矩阵重正化群（DMRG）数值计算，在11种阿基米德晶格中的9种上进行基态性质计算，并使用线性自旋波理论计算流体动力学参数（磁化率、磁化强度、刚度）进行比较。
AI.result: 四种晶格呈现平庸顺磁相，四种呈现共线奈尔磁有序（与方形晶格结果一致）；三角晶格发现多种竞争相（共面磁性、条纹密度波序、可能自旋液体）；kagome晶格可能是狄拉克自旋液体。
AI.conclusion: 偶极XY模型在不同阿基米德晶格上展现出丰富的相图，长程耦合对三角晶格上各竞争相的相对稳定性有显著影响，而kagome晶格则可能支持狄拉克自旋液体这一奇异量子态。

title: Mutual Linearity in Nonequilibrium Langevin Dynamics
summary: Understanding how nonequilibrium systems respond to perturbations is a central challenge in physics. In this work, we establish mutual linearity in nonequilibrium overdamped Langevin systems. This theory provides a framework for controlling and designing nonequilibrium responses in continuous systems. When a dynamical parameter is locally perturbed at a single position, the stationary densities at any two positions are linearly related. It further leads to mutual linearity among different stationary state-current observables. We also extend the mutual linearity to non-stationary relaxation processes in the Laplace domain. Our theory reveals that mutual linearity in both discrete and continuous systems originates from the same one-dimensional response structure. We further show that mutual linearity is robust under finite-width perturbations. As an application, we demonstrate the mutual linearity and its finite-width robustness in the F$_1$-ATPase rotary motor model.

AI.tldr: 该研究建立了非平衡过阻尼 Langevin 系统中的互线性理论，揭示了连续系统中局部扰动下稳态密度和电流可观测量的线性关系，并推广到非稳态弛豫过程，证明其源于一维响应结构，且在有限宽度扰动下具有鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 理解非平衡系统对外界扰动的响应是物理学中的一个核心挑战，但目前缺乏统一的理论框架来描述连续系统中的这类响应。
AI.method: 基于非平衡过阻尼 Langevin 系统建立互线性理论框架，从局部扰动出发推导稳态密度间的线性关系，扩展到稳态电流可观测量，并通过拉普拉斯域分析推广到非稳态弛豫过程。
AI.result: 发现离散和连续系统中的互线性源于相同的一维响应结构，且该线性关系在有限宽度扰动下保持鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 互线性理论为控制和设计非平衡系统的响应提供了框架，并在 F$_1$-ATPase 旋转马达模型中验证了其有效性和鲁棒性。

title: Finite-q photon-drag shift current in two-dimensional massive chiral Dirac fermions
summary: We investigate the photon-drag shift current in an isotropic single-valley two-dimensional massive chiral Dirac model with chirality index $J=1,2,3$ by directly evaluating the full finite-$q$ non-vertical response beyond the perturbative small-$q$ regime. Our central result is that chirality qualitatively reorganizes the sign topology of the finite-$q$ photocurrent $\mathbf{ j}(\mathbf{ q})$. For $J=1$, the photocurrent remains broadly positive, whereas higher-chirality sectors ($J \ge 2$) generically develop internal zero-current contours and sign reversals within the kinematically allowed region. We further show that the photocurrent is symmetry-constrained to be purely transverse, $\mathbf{j}(\mathbf{q}) \propto \hat{\mathbf{z}}\times\mathbf{q}$, and vanishes in the strictly vertical-transition limit $q=0$ in centrosymmetric systems. Pauli blocking further shapes the response by selecting the active portion of the resonance contour, while its extinction at large $Δ$ or $q$ follows from a simple kinematic cutoff. These results establish the isotropic massive chiral Dirac problem as a symmetry-controlled benchmark for chirality-dependent finite-$q$ shift currents.

AI.tldr: 本文研究各向同性单谷二维有质量手性狄拉克模型中的光子牵引位移电流，发现手性指标J会重塑有限波矢光电流的符号拓扑结构：J=1时光电流整体为正，而J≥2时出现零电流轮廓和符号反转。光电流受对称性约束为纯横向，且在中心对称系统中垂直跃迁极限下消失。
AI.motivation: 探索手性指标如何影响有限波矢下的光子牵引位移电流，超越微扰小q近似，揭示手性在光-物质相互作用中的新角色。
AI.method: 直接计算全有限q非垂直响应（超越微扰小q区域），分析各向同性单谷二维有质量手性狄拉克模型（手性指标J=1,2,3）。
AI.result: 手性定性重组了有限q光电流的符号拓扑：J=1光电流广泛为正，J≥2在运动学允许区域内出现零电流轮廓和符号反转；光电流纯横向且正比于ẑ×q；中心对称系统中q=0时垂直跃迁极限下光电流为零；Pauli阻塞和运动学截止进一步塑造响应。
AI.conclusion: 建立了各向同性有质量手性狄拉克问题作为手性依赖的有限q位移电流的对称性控制基准模型。

title: Multiscale Structure of Eigenstate Thermalization
summary: The eigenstate thermalization hypothesis provides a framework for understanding thermalization in isolated quantum many-body systems by characterizing statistical properties of local observables in energy eigenstates. Here we demonstrate that distributions of matrix elements in macroscopic systems may depend not only on the macrostate parameters, such as the densities of local conserved charges, but generally also on the properties of ensembles used in sampling eigenstates. To this end, we depart from the conventional analysis of microcanonical windows and consider statistical ensembles with an adjustable scale parameter prescribing the magnitude of charge fluctuations. We specifically consider an integrable field theory that permits efficient numerical sampling of matrix elements and reliable extrapolation to the thermodynamic limit. Moreover, in this system, we identify a class of states that enables explicit closed-form computation of the suppression rate of matrix elements. Our findings reveal an underlying multiscale structure of matrix elements captured by a non-analytic fluctuation-scale dependence of algebraic exponents governing their statistical properties.

AI.tldr: 本文挑战了本征态热化假设（ETH）中关于矩阵元分布仅依赖于宏观态参数的传统观点，通过引入可调尺度参数的统计系综，在可积场论中发现矩阵元存在多尺度结构，其代数指数具有非解析的涨落尺度依赖性。
AI.motivation: 传统ETH认为能量本征态中局部可观测量的矩阵元分布仅由宏观态参数（如局域守恒荷密度）决定。作者质疑这一假设的完备性，探究系综采样方式是否会对矩阵元统计性质产生额外影响。
AI.method: 偏离传统的微正则窗口分析，采用具有可调尺度参数（控制电荷涨落幅度）的统计系综；以可积场论为具体模型，进行高效的矩阵元数值采样并外推至热力学极限；识别出一类可解析计算矩阵元抑制率的特殊态。
AI.result: 发现矩阵元具有潜在的多尺度结构：控制其统计性质的代数指数对涨落尺度呈现非解析依赖，即矩阵元的分布不仅依赖于宏观态参数，还显著依赖于采样系综的特性。
AI.conclusion: ETH的适用范围需要重新审视——矩阵元统计可能具有更丰富的结构，系综选择在描述热化行为中扮演了以往被忽视的重要角色。

title: Exploring the Potential of Ternary Blending for Two and Three-Junction RAINBOW Solar Cells
summary: The efficiency of organic photovoltaics (OPV) has been steadily increasing over the past decade until reaching the 20\% milestone. Multijunction architectures provide a promising approach to further enhance performance. Here we explore the potential of a spectral splitting geometry, referred to as RAINBOW, in which subcells are placed side-by-side and externally connected, thus minimizing the fabrication and current matching challenges found in vertically stacked configurations. First, we tested 7 different binaries with bandgaps spanning from 1.98 to 1.16 eV. The systems with the widest and narrowest gaps suffered greater losses and so we evaluate if ternary mixing could help to overcome these limitations by evaluating 5 different ternaries. Generally speaking, ternary mixing tunes the Voc, and when morphology and energy levels are well aligned, the overall PCE can be boosted in the spectral region where the subcell should absorb, as is the case for PTB7-Th:COTIC-4F:BTP-eC9 when operating as red subcell. Device simulations help to identify the 2-junction and 3-junction configurations with highest PCEs, all of which include ternaries. We fabricate proof-of-concept RAINBOW devices using scalable methods in which the subcells are deposited by meniscus-guided blade coating. The efficiency improves from 12.9\% in single-junction devices to 15.9\% in 2-junction devices (16.4\% in simulations) and 17.3\% in 3-junction devices (17.7\% in simulations), confirming the viability of the RAINBOW architecture for scalable, high-efficiency OPVs. Finally, detailed balance analysis indicates that the potential of this geometry can be very high provided that high efficiency wide bandgap (2-2.5eV) materials become available.

AI.tldr: 本文探索了一种名为RAINBOW的光谱分裂几何结构用于有机光伏，通过并排放置子电池并外部连接，避免了垂直堆叠的制造和电流匹配难题。通过测试7种二元和5种三元体系，结合器件模拟，制造了从12.9%提升至17.3%效率的2节和3节电池，验证了该架构用于可扩展高效OPV的可行性。
AI.motivation: 有机光伏效率已达20%里程碑，多结架构是进一步提升性能的有前景途径。但垂直堆叠结构存在制造复杂和电流匹配挑战，因此需要探索更易实现的替代几何结构。
AI.method: 采用RAINBOW光谱分裂几何结构，子电池并排放置、外部连接；测试7种不同带隙（1.98-1.16 eV）的二元体系，对宽/窄带隙系统引入三元混合（5种三元体系）以提升性能；通过器件模拟确定最优2节和3节配置；采用弯月面引导刮涂法可扩展制备器件。
AI.result: 单节效率12.9%，2节器件15.9%（模拟16.4%），3节器件17.3%（模拟17.7%）。三元混合可调节Voc，在形态和能级匹配时可提升特定光谱区域的PCE，如PTB7-Th:COTIC-4F:BTP-eC9作为红色子电池的表现。
AI.conclusion: RAINBOW架构用于可扩展高效OPV具有可行性；详细平衡分析表明，若宽带隙（2-2.5 eV）高效材料可得，该几何结构的潜力将非常高。

title: Energy-Resolved Quantum Geometry from Středa Response: Driven-Dissipative Bosonic Lattices and Disordered Systems
summary: The Středa formula links the Hall conductivity of an insulator to the magnetic-field response of its particle density, providing a local and universal probe of the topological Chern number. Beyond this quantized response, an energy-resolved Středa marker can be defined from the magnetic response of the density of states, revealing detailed features of the quantum geometry of Bloch bands. We show that driven-dissipative bosonic lattices provide direct access to both the integrated and energy-resolved Středa responses. Our scheme uses controlled pumping with uniform strength and random phases across the lattice, together with uniform loss, to yield a Lorentzian filter of eigenmode occupations. For generic dispersive bands, this enables reconstruction of a coarse-grained energy-resolved Středa response, establishing these platforms as versatile probes of anomalous spectral flow and energy-resolved quantum geometry. As a striking application, we show that this marker elucidates the fate of topological bands under strong disorder, capturing the quantum-geometric structure underlying topological Anderson insulators.

AI.tldr: 本文提出在受驱动-耗散玻色子晶格中，通过均匀泵浦和损耗实现能量分辨的Středa响应测量，从而探测能带的量子几何和拓扑安德森绝缘体中的量子几何结构。
AI.motivation: Středa公式将绝缘体的霍尔电导与粒子密度对磁场的响应联系起来，是拓扑陈数的局域普适探针。但能量分辨的Středa标记能揭示布洛赫能带量子几何的精细特征，目前缺乏有效的实验实现方案。
AI.method: 在受驱动-耗散玻色子晶格中，采用均匀强度、随机相位的泵浦和均匀损耗，实现本征模占据的洛伦兹滤波，从而重建粗粒化的能量分辨Středa响应。
AI.result: 该方法能够重建能量分辨的Středa响应，并应用于强无序下的拓扑安德森绝缘体，揭示其量子几何结构。
AI.conclusion: 受驱动-耗散玻色子晶格可作为异常谱流和能量分辨量子几何的多功能探针，为研究无序系统中的拓扑相提供新途径。

title: Ferroelectric domains in methylammonium lead iodide perovskite thin-films
comment: 6 pages main manuscript + 7 pages Supplementary Information
summary: We explore the ferroic properties of methylammonium lead iodide perovskite solar cells by Piezoresponse Force Microscopy (PFM). In vertical and horizontal PFM imaging, we find domains of alternating polarization with a width of 90 nm which we identify as polarized ferroelectric domains. High-resolution photo-conductive atomic force micrographs under illumination also show alternating charge carrier extraction patterns which we attribute to the local vertical polarization components within the ferroelectric domains. The correlation of the sample properties with Atomic Force and Kelvin Probe Force Micrographs evidence the piezo-electric nature of the domains.

AI.tldr: 本文通过PFM、AFM和KPFM等技术，在甲基铵铅碘钙钛矿太阳能电池中发现了约90 nm宽的交替极化铁电畴，并证明这些畴结构影响光生电荷载流子的提取，揭示了铁电性与器件光电性能之间的关联。
AI.motivation: 探究甲基铵铅碘钙钛矿太阳能电池中铁电畴的存在及其对电荷提取和器件性能的影响，以理解钙钛矿太阳能电池优异光电性能的微观机制。
AI.method: 运用压电力显微镜（PFM）的垂直和水平成像模式观测极化畴结构，结合高分辨率光导原子力显微镜（pc-AFM）在光照下分析电荷提取模式，并用原子力显微镜（AFM）和开尔文探针力显微镜（KPFM）进行关联验证，以确认畴的压电性质。
AI.result: 观测到宽度约90 nm的交替极化畴，被认定为极化铁电畴；光照下pc-AFM显示交替的电荷载流子提取图案，与局部垂直极化分量相关；AFM和KPFM的关联成像证实了畴的压电性质。
AI.conclusion: 甲基铵铅碘钙钛矿中存在铁电畴结构，并且这些畴直接影响光生电荷的提取，为理解钙钛矿太阳能电池的光电转换机制提供了微观层面的证据。

title: Electronic excitations in the Shastry-Sutherland compound SrCu$_2$(BO$_3$)$_2$
summary: SrCu2(BO3)2 (SCBO) is a paradigmatic realization of the Shastry-Sutherland model, hosting geometrically frustrated spin dimers and a variety of quantum magnetic phases and phenomena. Although its magnetic properties have been extensively studied, the high-energy electronic excitations that determine the crystal-field environment and Cu-O hybridization have remained largely unexplored. Here we combine Cu L3-edge resonant inelastic x-ray scattering (RIXS), broadband optical spectroscopy, and electronic-structure calculations to determine the relevant local and interband excitation energy scales in SCBO. RIXS resolves a well-defined manifold of localized Cu2+ d-d excitations between 1.8 and 2.4 eV, whose energies and polarization dependence are well reproduced by multireference quantum-chemistry calculations. In contrast, optical spectroscopy identifies charge-transfer excitations with an absorption onset near 1.2-1.6 eV and a broader higher-energy structure around 4.5 eV, which are qualitatively captured by DFT+U calculations. Taken together, these results define the characteristic energy scales of d-d and CT excitations, offering quantitative benchmarks for computational frameworks and providing essential input for refining superexchange-based magnetic models of this prototypical frustrated quantum antiferromagnet.

AI.tldr: 本文结合RIXS、光学光谱和电子结构计算，系统确定了SrCu2(BO3)2（SCBO）材料中局域d-d激子和电荷转移激发的能量尺度，为理解这一阻挫量子反铁磁体的超交换模型提供了定量基准。
AI.motivation: 尽管SCBO的磁性已被广泛研究，但其决定晶场环境和Cu-O杂化的高能电子激发现尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 结合Cu L3-edge共振非弹性X射线散射（RIXS）、宽谱光学光谱和电子结构计算（多参考量子化学计算与DFT+U），系统表征SCBO中的电子激发。
AI.result: RIXS解析出1.8-2.4 eV范围内的Cu2+ d-d激发谱，与理论计算吻合；光学光谱识别出1.2-1.6 eV的电荷转移激发吸收边和约4.5 eV的高能结构。
AI.conclusion: 确定了d-d和CT激发的特征能量尺度，为计算框架提供了定量基准，并为改进该阻挫量子反铁磁体的超交换磁性模型提供了关键输入。

title: Anomalous magnetotransport in a non-collinear correlated kagome ferromagnet MgMn6Sn6
summary: Magnetic kagome metals provide a fertile platform for exploring unusual magnetotransport phenomena arising from the intricate interplay between electronic topology, electron correlations, and magnetic order. MgMn6Sn6 is a room-temperature kagome ferromagnet with strong in-plane magnetic anisotropy. Here, we report a combined study of single-crystal neutron diffraction (SCND) and magnetotransport properties of MgMn6Sn6, supported by first-principles calculations. Our SCND measurements reveal a non-collinear arrangement of Mn magnetic moments within the basal plane of the kagome bilayer. The Hall conductivity shows a substantial intrinsic contribution of approximately 0.29 e^2/h per kagome layer, which is nearly isotropic with respect to the field orientation. At low temperatures, the anomalous Hall conductivity develops a pronounced anisotropic extrinsic component, highlighting the directional sensitivity of scattering processes. The significantly large value of the Sommerfeld coefficient, in the absence of f-electrons, underscores enhanced electron correlation. Therefore, the non-collinear kagome ferromagnet MgMn6Sn6 is a promising candidate for studying the effects of electron correlation on magnetotransport properties.

AI.tldr: 本文通过单晶中子衍射和磁输运测量，结合第一性原理计算，研究了室温铁磁Kagome金属MgMn6Sn6。发现其Mn磁矩在Kagome双层基面内呈非共线排列，霍尔电导具有显著的固有贡献（约0.29 e^2/h每Kagome层），且低温下出现各向异性的非本征异常霍尔效应分量，以及缺乏f电子的情况下较大的索末菲系数，表明增强的电子关联效应。
AI.motivation: Kagome金属中电子拓扑、电子关联与磁有序之间存在复杂的相互作用，探索其非常规磁输运现象是当前凝聚态物理的重要课题。MgMn6Sn6作为室温Kagome铁磁体，具有强面内磁各向异性，为研究这些相互作用提供了理想平台。
AI.method: 采用单晶中子衍射（SCND）测量磁结构，结合磁输运性质测量，并辅以第一性原理计算进行理论支持。
AI.result: 1) SCND表明Mn磁矩在Kagome双层基面内呈非共线排列；2) 霍尔电导具有约0.29 e^2/h每Kagome层的固有贡献，且对场方向近乎各向同性；3) 低温下异常霍尔电导出现显著各向异性的非本征分量；4) 在无f电子情况下，索末菲系数显著增大，表明电子关联增强。
AI.conclusion: 非共线Kagome铁磁体MgMn6Sn6是研究电子关联对磁输运性质影响的理想候选材料。

title: Shuttling of $\mathbb{Z}_4$ parafermions in an electronic ladder model
summary: Parafermions with non-Abelian statistics have been proposed as a promising platform for quantum computation, potentially enabling a broader set of topologically protected gates than Majorana fermions. The experimental and theoretical exploration of these exotic quasiparticles remains challenging, as their stability is linked to strong electron-electron interactions. A key step toward practical applications is the controlled shuttling of parafermionic modes, which is required for implementing geometric braiding operations. In the present work, we investigate the real-time dynamics of the elementary shuttling process by applying a combination of the density matrix renormalization group and the time-dependent variational principle approaches. We analyze the transport of $\mathbb{Z}_4$ parafermion edge states and assess the corresponding adiabatic speed limit under experimentally relevant conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文利用DMRG和TDVP方法研究了Z4 parafermion边缘态的绝热穿梭过程，确定了在实际条件下实现拓扑保护量子计算所需的速度极限。
AI.motivation: Parafermion相比Majorana费米子能提供更多拓扑保护门，但实验实现和理论探索仍具挑战，尤其是受强电子-电子相互作用影响。为实现几何编织操作，需研究parafermion模式的受控穿梭。
AI.method: 结合密度矩阵重正化群（DMRG）和时间依赖变分原理（TDVP）方法，研究Z4 parafermion边缘态的基本穿梭过程的实时动力学。
AI.result: 分析了Z4 parafermion边缘态的输运过程，并评估了在实际实验条件下对应的绝热速度极限。
AI.conclusion: 为parafermion在量子计算中的实际应用提供了关键的速度约束条件，有助于指导未来实验设计。

title: Interfacial control of hot-carrier extraction and photostability in two-dimensional materials
summary: Two-dimensional transition metal dichalcogenides (TMDCs) are promising materials for next-generation optoelectronic devices, yet their implementation is hindered by limited sample stability and challenges in forming reliable electrical contacts. Here, by utilizing time-domain THz emission spectroscopy we directly probe charge carrier dynamics in monolayer WS2 on gold (Au) and fused silica (SiO2) as a function of interface morphology. For laser excitation above the band gap of WS2, we independently extract effective transport times for both electrons and holes and find that discontinuous WS2 contacts on rough Au generate larger net photocurrents than uniform, strongly coupled interfaces - a counterintuitive observation attributed to imbalanced electron and hole transfer from WS2 to Au. Crucially, we demonstrate that ultrafast charge extraction and separation suppress recombination-driven energy release and thereby prevent photo-induced degradation under ambient conditions, eliminating the need for encapsulation. These findings redefine interfacial design as a central control parameter for both performance and stability in 2D optoelectronic devices.

AI.tldr: 利用时间域太赫兹发射光谱研究单层WS2在Au和SiO2上的载流子动力学，发现粗糙Au上的不连续WS2接触能产生更大净光电流，且超快电荷提取可抑制光致降解，无需封装。
AI.motivation: 二维TMDCs在光电器件中受限于样品稳定性差和可靠电接触难以形成的问题，需要深入理解界面形态对载流子动力学的影响。
AI.method: 采用时间域太赫兹发射光谱直接探测单层WS2在金和熔融石英上的电荷载流子动力学，独立提取电子和空穴的有效输运时间，并比较不同界面形貌下的光电流响应。
AI.result: 粗糙Au上的不连续WS2接触比均匀强耦合界面产生更大的净光电流，归因于电子和空穴从WS2到Au的不平衡转移；超快电荷提取可抑制复合驱动的光致降解，无需封装。
AI.conclusion: 界面设计是调控2D光电器件性能和稳定性的核心参数，粗糙接触反而有利于电荷分离和器件稳定性。

title: Microscopic Magnetism of A(TiO)Cu4(PO4)4 (A = Ba, Pb, Sr): 31P and 63,65Cu NMR Study
summary: We report a comprehensive NMR study of the chiral square-cupola antiferromagnet Pb(TiO)Cu$_4$(PO$_4$)$_4$ and compare its microscopic hyperfine and local-field parameters with the Ba/Sr analogues in the $A$(TiO)Cu$_4$(PO$_4$)$_4$ family. Above $T_{\rm N}\simeq 6.7$ K, the $^{31}$P Knight shift tracks the bulk susceptibility and yields nearly isotropic transferred hyperfine couplings $H_{\rm hf}^{[010]}=6.77(3)$ and $H_{\rm hf}^{[001]}=6.19(3)$ kOe/$μ_{\rm B}$. Below $T_{\rm N}$, the frequency-swept $^{31}$P spectrum splits into three lines, in contrast to the four-line pattern reported for BaTCPO. The line separation tracks the onset of the static $^{31}$P internal field with a power-law exponent $β\simeq 0.23$, consistent with quasi-two-dimensional criticality. Crystal-rotation $^{31}$P NMR in the ordered state resolves all eight symmetry-related P sites and their site-dependent anisotropy. In the ordered state, zero-field $^{63,65}$Cu NMR gives a Cu-site internal field $B_{\rm int}=14.50(6)$ T and a quadrupole frequency $ν_Q=32.72(5)$ MHz, while point-charge electric-field-gradient calculations including Sternheimer corrections yield an on-site Cu hole occupancy $n_d=0.20(4)$, consistent with a ligand-hole-dominated charge-transfer character. Comparing PbTCPO with BaTCPO and SrTCPO, we find that the transferred hyperfine coupling $H_{\rm hf}$ varies across the series, reflecting changes in local Cu-O-P covalency, whereas the ordered-state $^{31}$P internal field in PbTCPO is $69.5$ mT, considerably higher than in BaTCPO ($35.6$ mT) and SrTCPO ($34.6$ mT). This enhancement is not captured by dipolar terms alone and points to the combined effects of transferred contributions and stacking-dependent cancellation.

AI.tldr: 本文通过核磁共振（NMR）研究了手性方顶盖反铁磁体Pb(TiO)Cu₄(PO₄)₄，并与同家族Ba/Sr类似物对比，揭示了其超精细耦合、内场分布、Cu位空穴占据等微观性质，发现PbTCPO中³¹P内场显著高于Ba/Sr类似物，且源于转移超精细作用与堆垛依赖的抵消效应。
AI.motivation: 探究PbTCPO在A(TiO)Cu₄(PO₄)₄家族中的微观磁性和超精细相互作用，特别是与Ba/Sr类似物的差异，以理解化学替换对局域电子结构和磁有序的影响。
AI.method: 采用³¹P和⁶³,⁶⁵Cu NMR测量，结合Knight位移、频率扫描谱、晶体旋转NMR、零点场NMR以及点电荷电场梯度计算（含Sternheimer修正），系统分析超精细耦合、内场和各向异性。
AI.result: ¹³¹P Knight位移显示近各向同性转移超精细耦合（6.77和6.19 kOe/μ_B）；²有序态下³¹P谱分裂为3条线（BaTCPO为4条），内场达69.5 mT，显著高于BaTCPO（35.6 mT）和SrTCPO（34.6 mT）；³Cu位内场14.50 T，空穴占据n_d=0.20(4)，符合配体空穴主导的电荷转移特征。
AI.conclusion: PbTCPO中增强的³¹P内场不能用偶极相互作用单独解释，需考虑转移超精细贡献及堆垛依赖的抵消效应，表明化学替换通过改变Cu-O-P共价性显著影响超精细耦合和磁结构。

title: MatterSim-MT: A multi-task foundation model for in silico materials characterization
summary: Accurate property characterization is a major bottleneck in materials design. While first-principles methods and task-specific machine-learning models have driven important progress, they remain fundamentally limited in scalability and generalizability across the vast space of structures and properties relevant to real-world materials design. We present MatterSim-MT, a multi-task foundation model for in silico materials simulation and property characterization. The model is pretrained on over 35 million first-principles-labeled structures covering 89 elements, temperatures up to 5000 K and pressures up to 1000 GPa, and is fine-tuned on various properties including Bader charges, magnetic moments, Born effective charges, and dielectric matrices. Out of the box, MatterSim-MT not only serves as a foundation model for predicting material structure, dynamics and thermodynamics, its multi-task architecture also enables a wide range of complex simulations that cannot be captured by potential energy surfaces alone. For example, we demonstrate pressure-dependent LO-TO phonon splitting in SiC with close agreement with experiment, electric hysteresis in ferroelectric BaTiO3, and the cationic-to-anionic redox transition during delithiation of a Li-rich cathode material. Finally, we show that MatterSim-MT scales well with more data and parameters, can be efficiently fine-tuned to higher levels of theory, and can be efficiently extended to new systems via active learning. Overall, we believe this approach provides a scalable route to accurate in silico materials characterization.

AI.tldr: MatterSim-MT是一个多任务基础模型，基于3500万个第一性原理标记结构预训练，能够预测材料结构、动力学和热力学，并支持Bader电荷、磁矩、Born有效电荷和介电矩阵等多种属性预测，在声子劈裂、铁电迟滞和氧化还原转变等复杂模拟中表现优异。
AI.motivation: 第一性原理方法和任务特定机器学习模型在可扩展性和泛化能力上存在根本性局限，无法高效覆盖材料设计中广泛的结构与性质空间，亟需更通用的解决方案。
AI.method: 构建多任务基础模型MatterSim-MT，在超过3500万第一性原理标记结构（覆盖89种元素，温度达5000K，压力达1000GPa）上预训练，再针对多种属性（Bader电荷、磁矩、Born有效电荷、介电矩阵等）进行微调，支持超越势能面的复杂模拟。
AI.result: 模型在压力依赖的SiC LO-TO声子劈裂、BaTiO3铁电迟滞、Li富集正极材料的阴阳离子氧化还原转变等复杂模拟中与实验高度吻合，且随数据和参数增加表现出良好的扩展性。
AI.conclusion: MatterSim-MT提供了一种可扩展的路线，能够实现准确的材料原位表征，支持高效微调至更高级理论，并可通过主动学习高效扩展到新体系。

title: Light-driven octupolar inverse Faraday effect and multipolar order in Mott insulators
summary: Hidden multipolar orders in spin-orbit-coupled Mott insulators provide a promising setting for correlated quantum matter, yet their control and detection remain major challenges. Here, we demonstrate that circularly polarized light enables both in $4d^2/5d^2$ systems with edge-sharing octahedra. Using a Floquet Schrieffer-Wolff expansion of a driven Hubbard-Kanamori model, we derive a low-energy multipolar Hamiltonian with two qualitatively new light-driven terms. One is an effective static field that couples linearly to the magnetic octupole, realizing an octupolar inverse Faraday effect. The other is a bond-dependent anisotropic exchange interaction absent in equilibrium. These two couplings are the key result of this work: the first provides a direct optical handle on hidden octupolar order, while the second reorganizes the multipolar exchange landscape and opens an enlarged Kitaev-like multipolar liquid regime. Their interplay produces a nonequilibrium multipolar phase space inaccessible in equilibrium, enabling optical tuning among antiferro-octupolar, ferro-octupolar, partially polarized ferro-quadrupolar, Ising octupolar, and multipolar liquid phases. We further show that the induced multipolar order couples to the lattice, generating reversible trigonal and tetragonal distortions that provide structural fingerprints in pump-probe experiments. Our work establishes a general mechanism for the optical generation, control, and detection of hidden multipolar quantum states.

AI.tldr: 本文通过Floquet理论证明，圆偏振光可以在自旋-轨道耦合的4d²/5d² Mott绝缘体中产生两种新的光致耦合——八极逆Faraday效应和键依赖各向异性交换作用，从而实现对隐藏多极序的光学操控、调控和检测，并伴随可逆晶格畸变提供结构指纹。
AI.motivation: 自旋-轨道耦合Mott绝缘体中的隐藏多极序是重要的关联量子物质，但其控制和检测极具挑战。现有平衡态手段难以直接操控这些高阶多极序，亟需发展新的非平衡态调控方案。
AI.method: 采用Floquet-Schrieffer-Wolff展开方法，对驱动下的Hubbard-Kanamori模型进行低能约化，推导出包含圆偏振光诱导项的多极哈密顿量，并结合晶格自由度分析光致结构畸变。
AI.result: 发现了两种定性新颖的光驱动项：(1) 与磁八极矩线性耦合的等效静态场（八极逆Faraday效应）；(2) 平衡态不存在的键依赖各向异性交换作用。二者结合产生了反铁八极、铁八极、部分极化铁四极、Ising八极和多极液体等多种非平衡态相。
AI.conclusion: 建立了利用圆偏振光产生、调控和检测隐藏多极量子态的一般机制，为关联量子材料中高阶多极序的非平衡态操控提供了理论框架和实验可观测的结构指纹。

title: Anisotropic Defect Diffusion in Layered CsPbBr$_\mathrm{x}$I$_\mathrm{3-x}$ Perovskites
summary: Mixed-halide perovskites offer a route to enhance phase stability and modify optoelectronic properties. Here, we use large-scale molecular dynamics simulations with a reactive force field to investigate defects in CsPbBr$_\mathrm{x}$I$_\mathrm{3-x}$ perovskites, focusing on how defect mobility can be controlled and the stability of the material may be improved by layered ordering of Br and I anions in layers. Our results show that layered halide ordering induces strongly anisotropic defect diffusion: migration proceeds readily along the layers, whereas diffusion across them is strongly suppressed. For Cs defects, this anisotropy originates from directional lattice strain and the associated octahedral tilting, while halide migration is governed by an interplay between strain and preferential local halide bonding configurations.

AI.tldr: 本文通过反应力场分子动力学模拟，发现卤素分层有序排列（Br/I分层）可使CsPbBrₓI₃₋ₓ钙钛矿中的缺陷扩散呈现强各向异性——沿层方向迁移容易，跨层迁移则被显著抑制，从而提升材料稳定性。
AI.motivation: 混合卤素钙钛矿虽可调控性能，但缺陷迁移导致的不稳定性是实际应用的瓶颈。作者希望通过卤素分层有序排列来控制缺陷迁移率并改善材料稳定性。
AI.method: 采用反应力场（reactive force field）进行大规模分子动力学模拟，研究CsPbBrₓI₃₋ₓ钙钛矿中缺陷在Br/I分层有序结构下的行为。
AI.result: 卤素分层有序导致缺陷扩散强各向异性：沿层方向迁移容易，跨层迁移被显著抑制。Cs缺陷的 anisotropy 源于定向晶格应变和八面体倾斜，而卤素缺陷迁移则受应变与局部卤素键合构型的共同调控。
AI.conclusion: 通过卤素分层有序排列可有效控制缺陷扩散方向性，为提升混合卤素钙钛矿的稳定性提供了设计策略。

title: Gapped 1/9 Magnetization Plateau in the Anisotropic Kagome Antiferromagnet Y-kapellasite
summary: Fractional magnetization plateaus provide a sensitive probe of many-body spin states in frustrated quantum magnets, yet their microscopic origin in kagome antiferromagnets remains unresolved. This is particularly true of the mysterious $1/9$ plateau, which is predicted by theory but infrequently observed in experiment. Here, we investigate this problem in the $S = 1/2$ anisotropic kagome antiferromagnet Y-kapellasite, Y$_3$Cu$_9$(OH)$_{19}$Cl$_8$, using pulsed-field magnetization measurements on single crystals and high-field $^{35}$Cl NMR. We identify a hierarchy of field-induced fractional features, including $1/3$ and $1/9$ plateaus, as well as a weaker low-field feature. Analysis of the NMR spectra and the magnetic susceptibility across the $1/9$ plateau demonstrate that it is accompanied by an ordered local spin configuration, a strong suppression of low-energy spin fluctuations and activated behavior, consistent with a gapped fractional state. These features differ from those in the only other material YCu$_3$(OH)$_6$Br$_2$[Br$_{1-y}$(OH)$_y$] in which this plateau is observed, implying a surprising robustness of the $1/9$ state to the details of the underlying magnetism.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过脉冲场磁化测量和NMR技术，在Y-kapellasite单晶中观测到1/9和1/3分数磁化平台，并揭示1/9平台伴随有序自旋构型、低能自旋涨落被强烈抑制以及能隙行为，表明该平台源于一种有能隙的分数化自旋态，且这种态对不同磁性细节具有鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: Kagome反铁磁体中分数磁化平台的微观起源尚未解决，尤其是理论上预测但实验上罕见的1/9平台，亟需通过实验揭示其物理本质。
AI.method: 对Y$_3$Cu$_9$(OH)$_{19}$Cl$_8$单晶进行脉冲场磁化测量和高场$^{35}$Cl NMR实验，分析NMR谱、磁化率及自旋动力学特征。
AI.result: 观测到1/3和1/9分数平台及一个较弱低场特征；1/9平台伴随有序自旋构型、低能自旋涨落强烈抑制及激活行为（有能隙的分数化态）；该态与另一材料YCu$_3$(OH)$_6$Br$_2$[Br$_{1-y}$(OH)$_y$]中观察到的1/9平台特征不同，表明1/9态对底层磁性细节具有出人意料的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 1/9磁化平台对应一种有能隙的分数化自旋态，且该态对不同材料的磁性细节不敏感，具有鲁棒性，为理解Kagome反铁磁体中的分数化现象提供了关键实验证据。
